name: =?utf-8?Q?Robert=20Foster?=
subject: I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Robert Foster_
body:
| |
---
| | | Dear friend,

Many have been speculating for a while, but I can confirm it’s true: **I am, once again, running for public office, and here's why:**

During the pandemic we found out just how important state and local politics are.

Those of us blessed to live in an area with local elected officials who refused to enforce unconstitutional mandates from our Governor and Washington enjoyed much more freedom than people who lived in local communities where tyrants abused their power and “followed orders”. It may be behind us, but we can’t forget and we can’t let them retain their positions of power.

Washington is broken, but even worse is that a deep red conservative state like MS is also broken. We have an establishment group of uni-party politicians running our state GOP who not only didn’t stand up for liberty when we most needed them to, but they all mostly participated in the pageantry of tyranny. We have to start local and take back over our state from the ground up. This isn’t the easy way, but it is the only way.

We have to take over our school boards, our county positions, and our state government. We saw just how bad our leadership is in our state when they shut down churches, forced masks on children in schools for over a year, forced employees in certain industries into experimental drug treatments in order to keep their jobs, and locked down and fined small businesses for simply refusing to follow unconstitutional orders.

At this time my heart is at home with my family and my business, but I know I need to do my part. My children only have a few short years left at home and my business, like many other small businesses, is struggling with inflation.

I know this may not meet some of your expectations, many are wanting another big statewide announcement but my plans are to run for Supervisor in my county of DeSoto. I hope I can inspire others to do the same, because although we may not be able to fix Washington we can refuse to enforce their unconstitutional and Godless policies here at home.

This doesn’t mean I’m not ever going to run for some other office, it just means for now I must focus on what’s most important which is my family and my local community. I’m asking all of you to do the same thing right now. Spend the next few election cycles focused on your local government and less on Washington and I promise it will pay off in a huge way. If we will take over our local government we can then more easily take over our state government.

I’m honored that so many have reached out with offers of support. So, I’m asking you once again for your support and your vote if you live in DeSoto County's Fifth District. If the timing is ever right and I feel led, I may ask you again one day for your support for an even bigger race.

**[Regardless of where you live, YOU can still help us win in 2023 and ensure we have conservative fighters at the local and state level.](https://foster2023.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5ee1b2f1627d322150edb995&id=c0142f08f3&e=7f8b4f6b16)**

---
| [ ](https://foster2023.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5ee1b2f1627d322150edb995&id=cbd7a89350&e=7f8b4f6b16)
---
|
Thank you,
And may God Bless these United States.
---
|
---
|
Robert Foster
---

name: Vernon Robinson, US Air Force Academy 1977
subject: Help Lt Commander Kevin Adams USN ret. win a VA senate seat
body:
| Peter \--

During the last election, you helped us elect Jen Kiggans to Congress. As a result there is a special election to fill her VA Senate Seat. Please check out a candidate we all can support, Retired Navy Lt Commander Kevin Adams. Please click on this link https://www.kevinadamsforsenate.com/ to check him out. If you like what you see, please donate to his campaign. Please do that today as the special election is only eight days away. Vernon Robinson PS. we don't send emails ten times a day that insult your intelligence. we just let you know when you have an opportunity to beat a commie and support a patriot. Please help Kevin today

[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kevin_adams&n=1)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kevin_adams&n=2)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kevin_adams&n=3)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kevin_adams&n=4)[](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kevin_adams&n=5)[http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/](http://www.blackamericansmaga.org/?e=305294bd7e656b520643df50a255d78c&utm_source=draftew&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kevin_adams&n=6)

clean_body: | Peter \-- During the last election, you helped us elect Jen Kiggans to Congress. As a result there is a special election to fill her VA Senate Seat. Please check out a candidate we all can support, Retired Navy Lt Commander Kevin Adams. Please click on this link to check him out. If you like what you see, please donate to his campaign. Please do that today as the special election is only eight days away. Vernon Robinson PS. we don't send emails ten times a day that insult your intelligence. we just let you know when you have an opportunity to beat a commie and support a patriot. Please help Kevin today -=-=- Black Americans to Re-elect the President · United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Van=20Taylor?=
subject: With gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to express my gratitude for the opportunity to serve my fellow Texans for the past 12 years -- first in the Texas House, then the Texas Senate, and now in the U.S. House. I ran to serve, and we accomplished so much for our community, state, and nation. Collin County remains the very best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I am eternally thankful for the many people who made my service possible: activists, donors, supporters, and most of all my family.

Over the last ten months, I have done much soul searching and reflecting on past actions, but more importantly on what lies ahead. Reading the Bible every day has brought peace and hope. I can honestly say I did not know God's love and grace until I endeavored to know his every word.

Every day my faith grows as I work to rebuild trust in my family. I am grateful for God's forgiveness and my family's love and understanding.

Thank you again for giving me the tremendous honor of representing you.

With Gratitude,

Van

---
| | Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Van Taylor Campaign, All rights reserved._

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: With gratitude and hope for a healthy and Happy New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friend,

Today, I write with a grateful heart to express my appreciation for the high honor bestowed upon me to serve as Speaker of the House. I am humbled by the faith placed in me by the House Democratic Caucus — the greatest collection of intellect, integrity and imagination assembled for the good of the American people. I am thankful to the people of San Francisco whom I will continue to serve, striving to honor the call of the patron saint of our city, Saint Francis: “Lord, make me an instrument of thy peace.”

As we begin a new year, a new chapter and a new Congress, I am thrilled and committed to supporting the next generation of Democratic leaders and I am deeply appreciative of you, our volunteers in policy and politics who make everything possible.

Your outside mobilization helped courageous House Democrats advance transformative legislation to make progress in people’s lives – creating jobs, lowering health care costs, investing in climate action, helping veterans and military families access lifesaving cancer care and defending our freedoms and Democracy at home and around the world. You made a real difference for America’s working families. I continue to draw strength from you.

With gratitude and hope for a healthy and Happy New Year,

NANCY

Follow me on Twitter! >> https://twitter.com/TeamPelosi

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/D6uJxOgDQUu8umzAjMQV8g2?unsubscribedata=S8X%2FrUjKB23KkW%2BdIcnTD7CWFoQNRnTK484W8dBARFITYUY6dxIqiwHYjc%2BpBApSnc%2FnsZi7%2FhqCEV06Zf1GH0Z8vptoew9KAZMHcqwuoOdTlDlZMYD%2BT3nBzE87BpI8TiRsoUOgR%2FBvcE1lJVwRfN7gzs%2BGnFPmF5LeZ%2FDyt6eTVWI5%2BK1XulIhb%2FgwW4ymcJRs3KDOiBChx%2FtjKOz9l5rfZFkIfPyRmXCSpYbMXjEN8E8wGtJ41sNrDaRgIH79k%2BpvbcAFiMn0iaO2n8NXjGdMTuxM1aVB%2FUDPrtxC6pH9KYwjj2O6fpj7qqjqL7aN6eIReR4m2D61M4Me8onuve14Ymo5W%2BNu9%2F7JLRaZHZc0kvaqC2LcinXdgHWpcs7CrWGcFQ9zmIqRAe247z8sRgveU5b2%2ByX9inNsiZuySthLYzsxHfqp0qVx6yA7yFSQ .

subject: YOU'RE INVITED: Wesley Hunt Swearing-In Ceremony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
We would love to see you there | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/eafac7ef32bd/youre-invited-wesley-hunt-swearing-in-ceremony-5259867?e=6b59dbf13a)

| |
---
| | Friend,

I wanted to send you another reminder that you and your family are invited to attend my Congressional Swearing-In Ceremony on **Saturday, January 7th at 2 PM at Champions Forest Baptist Church**! This very special Ceremony will be led by Judge Lincoln Goodwin, with a special invocation given by Pastor Jarrett Stephens.

During my campaign, I vowed to take Houston's conservative values to Washington, and I will honor that pledge, starting with taking my oath of office right here in Congressional District 38. I look forward to seeing you there!

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

| Peter,

On January 3, the 118th United States Congress will be sworn in and Lori will become Oregon's newest Congresswoman.

She asked us to make sure you were there for this historic moment, and we want to give you the opportunity to have a front-row seat from the comfort of your own home.

You can watch Lori’s swearing-in ceremony on January 3 at 9 am pst via this link: [**https://live.house.gov/**](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=0d891ba232&e=c87c5d8d97)

body:
There’s an invasion happening, and Biden is doing nothing to stop it. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0381%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=G6SgHhgLZdCRqX36VEaSdQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

There’s an invasion happening, and Biden is doing nothing to stop it.

And no, we’re not talking about Ukraine.

_**This invasion is happening right here on America’s southern border.**_

The largest immigration caravan reached Texas on Sunday, December 11, when over **1,000** people crossed the U.S.-Mexico border into El Paso, Texas. The next day, over **2,300** immigrants came into that sector in 24 hours.

And that’s only what happened in 2 days near El Paso. **Over 2 MILLION illegal immigrants have come across the southern border. **

**And what is Biden doing about it?

NOTHING.**

Friend, you and I need a leader that’s serious about taking on sanctuary cities and stopping illegal immigration.

We need Ron DeSantis.

We’re Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President in 2024 because we are tired of the hypocrisy of the Democrat Left.

We’ve set a goal to raise $1 million before New Year’s Eve to help draft DeSantis to run for President.

[_**If you’re ready for a president who won’t shy away from the tough fights and work to secure our country, can you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Ron EXPOSED the Left’s hypocrisy when he sent 50 illegal immigrants to Martha’s Vineyard, New Hampshire - Biden’s home state and where many Democrats, like the Obama family, own homes-- sympathy and care were not what these immigrants found.

Instead, the community declared an emergency and deployed the National Guard.

**The message they gave to America?****2 MILLION illegal immigrants are fine as long as they're far away from the elite Left. **

The Left doesn’t care about helping legal immigrants, stopping human or drug trafficking, or any of the increasing number of crimes at our southern border.

[_**If you’re ready for a president who will fight for YOU, YOUR rights, and YOUR community, click here to send your urgent donation before NYE >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655560%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dvfWsi7CY3L%2fr8eNTwB7rA&sysid=1)

The best candidates for President need to prove an ability to govern.

subject: Wisconsin has a 4-3 right-wing Court majority. This allowed voter suppression efforts to remain in place in 2022, and protected the most absurd gerrymander in the country. body:
Can’t-miss election opportunity for a State Supreme Court seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1a92ce6-b43f-48a1-b383-9d30cf3a34aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Perhaps the most important election of the year is only six weeks away. In Wisconsin--one of the two or three closest swing states in the country--there will be a primary for Wisconsin Supreme Court._** _Why is this so important? Let us count the ways: Right now Wisconsin has a 4-3 right-wing Court majority. This allowed voter suppression efforts to remain in place in 2022, including a ban on absentee-ballot drop boxes and closing polling places in disproportionately minority neighborhoods. Additionally, it protected the most absurd gerrymander in the country. Democratic Governor Tony Evers won his race 51-48%. Yet, Republicans won a two thirds supermajority in the WI senate and missed one in the WI assembly by one vote. _ **_Thankfully, one of the right wing hack judges is leaving the court. This will lead to an open primary February 18th, with the top-two vote getters running in the general election in April. We must elect a Democrat, _**_and in an ideal world we'd elect both Democrats in the primary, ensuring the eventual general election winner--and a new Wisconsin Supreme Court majority--is progressive and respects democracy._ [**Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to candidate Judge Janet Protasiewicz or Judge Everett Mitchell, or both? Wouldn’t it be wonderful if we could guarantee a good result based on the primary?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c43c02f-7d2a-4f95-ba4c-74b356bd2ccb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te581572c-7a15-49b9-8d41-de4d4e827ad1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_With the betrayal of Roe. Wade by a stolen majority of religious zealots on the U.S. Supreme Court, Wisconsin's Court will decide if an 1849 state law banning abortion is constitutional. There's no mystery here--if Republicans win they'll have a 4-3 majority to ban abortion in virtually all cases, including rape, incest and the life of the mother._**_ _ _Therefore, we must fund both progressive candidates, Dane County Judge Everett Mitchell & Milwaukee County Judge Janet Protasiewicz. Even more so as reporting has been done showing the secretive authoritarian Federalist Society--the same group of goons that saddled SCOTUS with the likes of Thomas, Alito, Kavanaugh and the rest--started dropping large amounts of cash into state court races. Sadly, it allowed them to take back both Ohio and North Carolina courts this past election cycle, and we have not yet begun to see the damage this will do._ **_We cannot lose this race in Wisconsin. It'll even have presidential implications, with WI being a key state we must win in 2024 to hold the White House. In other words, to stop a cruel, corrupt and incompetent Trump, DeSantis, Ted Cruz type from being handed the state with voter suppression or other election thievery_. ** **[Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to candidate Judge Janet Protasiewicz or Judge Everett Mitchell, or both? Wouldn’t it be wonderful if we could guarantee a good result based on the primary?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d149654-63de-43ba-b7b8-70a5736cb22a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** Thank you for helping us protect our democracy in Wisconsin and the entire county. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2144a794-6933-41e8-8d0b-1e0f8a2d7714/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Deroy Murdock

Peter,

After a record-setting win, Governor Ron DeSantis is being sworn in for a second term as Governor of the Free State of Florida.

Today’s Swearing-In Ceremony is a testament to the Governor’s tireless efforts in the fight to preserve our freedom in this great state.

Under his leadership, Florida is the best state in the nation to raise a family, make a living, and enjoy our God-given rights as Americans.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: 2022 Year in Review
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| It has always been the goal of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus (MFC) to promote the ideals of individual rights, limited government, and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi; but more importantly, we want to keep Mississippians informed of what is going on in Jackson and DC. We also want to provide an avenue for action, so that everyday Mississippians, just like you, can have their voices be heard. The MFC had a great year in 2022 and we attribute it all to YOU, our supporters, and activists. We could not have done it without YOU. We wanted to provide a summary of 2022 and the amazing work that the MFC has been able to accomplish with you by our side: 68 email messages were sent to our email followers, accounting for nearly 3.6 million individual emails and over 13,000 text messages sent to Mississippians, in order to keep you informed.
* 9 action campaigns, accounting for over 5,600 citizen actions, were completed this year, including those to STOP: Eminent Domain, ESGs, Red Flag Gun Confiscation, Back-Door Deals, and Gender Reassignment Therapy on Children.
* 16 Freedom Corner Podcasts were produced this year during the 2022 legislative session, bringing you the latest news from under the dome, accounting for nearly 50,000 downloads.
* 15 candidates and potential future MFC members interested in running for office in 2023 attended a MFC candidate training course in November.

There were many major legislative accomplishments for the MFC in 2022, the first of which was the defeat of a senate bill that would create a quasi-governmental entity with the authority to issue bonds, assess fees, and take property through eminent domain. Then MFC Chairman Steve Hopkins went on the nationally syndicated [Glenn Beck Program](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/L4cLRov46nxRrYG8eXFXiQ) to discuss the bill. Through the efforts of our activists, almost 1,000 emails were sent to House members, prompting the committee chairman handling the bill to announce on the House floor that the bill was “dead, dead, dead.” After the 2022 legislative session concluded, the MFC elected new leadership consisting of Dana Criswell (Chairman), Brady Williamson (Vice-Chairman), and Dan Eubanks, (Secretary/Treasurer) to lead the MFC in 2023. We have big plans for 2023 and hope that you will continue to fight along with us. Our success is ONLY because of your actions and your support. If you are a donor to the MFC we thank you for your support and for protecting our conservative values in Mississippi. If you aren’t a donor, please consider giving to the MFC so that we can continue to fight for your rights and freedoms.
---
|
---
|
## Donate Today!
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus needs your help. We have a plan to keep Mississippi on track. **America is falling apart before our eyes. **Inflation is nuking the economy.The stock market and 401ks are crumbling to pieces before our eyes. Families are concerned about how they are going to pay bills, fill their gas tanks, and provide food for their families. Does this sound like America? In Mississippi we must protect ourselves from Biden and the Democrat's far-left agenda.Here’s our plan:Secures our ElectionsOppose Gun ControlOppose Wasteful SpendingMake Mississippi a Sanctuary for LifeOppose ESGOppose Expansion of Welfare to Able-Bodied Adults [**I am emailing you asking for your help. Can you donate $5, $20, $50 CLICK HERE!**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/QsaYFBfosW2SDFaM318ufA)
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/KAE51ffR-OtESPB7MfhO5w) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

In the two years since Democrats won the White House, Veronica and her colleagues have made historic strides for working people.

We thought we'd take a page out of John Lennon's book and ask: What have we done?

We're grateful to have you with us.

name: K. Gillibrand
subject: We need more women in Congress. Period.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, can you guess how many more women will be serving in the 118th Congress after the historic victories for Democrats in the 2022 midterms?

**Only two.**
At a moment in our country when reproductive freedom — a woman's right to make _her own_ decisions about _her own_ body — is under attack, we need more women at the decision-making table. We need more women's voices to be heard. We need more women in the halls of Congress.
Because the fact of the matter is that if we had more women in Congress, we would have different outcomes. We wouldn't be wasting time debating whether or not we should codify Roe v. Wade, we would codify it. Period.
**That's exactly what I founded Off the Sidelines to do — to elect more Democratic women to the House and Senate. So as we head into this new election cycle, it's time to redouble our efforts to help more strong women candidates run and win. But it's going to take each and every one of us, so I need to know if you're standing with me. **
**[Please, friend, I'm personally asking you now: Will you sign your name to stand with me in the fight to elect more Democratic women to the halls of Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56825818/386119696/717339540?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3845-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM3OTk0Yi03ZThiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-uxJxYxI2R61ROcbl8cmb4_-ys07Y35niBopPc2FpXA=&emci=02f5776b-1382-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=50c7994b-7e8b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**

Patriot,

We have an urgent update from Team Lake.

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari's election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhb59om16eh08e81a7ejvvab61gb3h9qih0lia10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm8or4c9h2bs)****["](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7nq7rc12qd27ameho10eqcqnm6pa9e99e7h1vng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm8or4c9h2bs) --is now available as a free online video series.**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh0qip5ip511mvbp02akena6o52o755g7hk8ubho_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm8or4c9h2bs)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3ojn4pqf3vh7fubt283solj9icpjisugo8nv81g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm8or4c9h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztvb33ehqoiec6preia16tcuok6amo5stfq29uh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcpj5cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvglvsa0hpsr8bts020p79r6n51ja7sohrule1ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcpj5cth2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl14vuvtm37id8f6ttntf6n85q1v1glilp6dmjgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcpj5cth2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9a609a84llbbujf0t3kpmeillb5ltit5sbi0tng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcpj5cth2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have hours before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlcrf40bvqms0os8q341pg498vtrn1m4sog3j3n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcpj5cth2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z96mg8p2vi2a4h64ruv69plc34vhq797cbsc7i78_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcpj5cth2bs)**

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaokf8l7p066jsd7ch4dni1eabo6bh2erc8qva70_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn06hvofiqu3hqrmqffodf0ohhk04krgr443tpi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zehru8ir5ukp7ub8gnrsna00ekllorlm76g52ub8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze420975vmqnmefo4iedq5e1ogs4qdqusael22uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze210d2m0n569jg85m99kmlag44p4jg2k2q9fg80_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3foj41jkmt7m296jtnflb88jn7ijgebq3hitu60_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpp10i1hfp09q05lu34qitsi2flqf01us5ngtfco_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmfeu3dgntbbpttk0rh60s5hmltjjobc9m7dks18_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo7r9ae3m01bp25n8lc9864ikt7417u6433dpjn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsec1f35lvaj3auhfp5863228n2m0u80tilcgc28_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zggdspfq46cevlf0nlnr25vcdpdkd2if3r8lbd8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zta5pobg7rt9icsa4uta2pkeegl94gmhu2onrjk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z920t1c18ud5q086l3cv3slrq6eekbngti73b4qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjgjvok0ji3tgm5efp9geaoa1leruteofjhhusmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkf5s56ti2te48qpeo9m92enj65f9is0ui8r13k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zab8qapvm7rate3spcf3gtbql2ntgbgoipahm4bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z38a4tmv0d5tet5s67n07c2sqhpm7et05m0kuht0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhm84753lh120hf7pdh9rg442msc28otbglu5260_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z071gb1mlhjc27e4qpsofptmb3ae9ohrngqce2ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvcoepcf3fu55srtpmgq0f4s2h243f0flf3svg30_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn7g6b9g70erqkb3kmiqu8itra5ndi31v0drnda8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcp76chh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" name: Steve Scalise
subject: This is the last time I’ll ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
**> > FROM THE DESK OF MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE <<**
Hi Peter, it's Steve Scalise.
**Today 's the day Republicans officially take back the House and I take up the mantle of Majority Leader.**
It's a great honor with equally great responsibility. Getting America back on track is no small task and ensuring our government is working for the people it was built to serve won't be easy. But I know together, we can accomplish anything.
That's why I have a very important question for you, Peter. [**I am humbly asking for your endorsement.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62151206:6r0KUwG4N:m:1:3331421248:3E116E666C523931B23DCA087EDC93D9:r)
It's really important to me to know that I have your support, especially as we take on the great challenges ahead of us: securing the border, fighting inflation, cracking down on crime, protecting free and fair elections, and so much more.
[**Can you take just 5 seconds out of your day to endorse me before Republicans officially take back the House?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62151206:6r0KUwG4N:m:1:3331421248:3E116E666C523931B23DCA087EDC93D9:r)
It will be a great honor to serve as your next Majority Leader in Congress but I need the support of my entire grassroots network, especially those who have been with me every step of the way, just like you.
[**I 'm humbly asking for your endorsement, right here and right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62151206:6r0KUwG4N:m:1:3331421248:3E116E666C523931B23DCA087EDC93D9:r)
Best,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62151206:6r0KUwG4N:m:1:3331421248:3E116E666C523931B23DCA087EDC93D9:r)
Steve Scalise
Majority Leader-elect
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: Letitia James
subject: 1,000 Founding Donors needed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
You helped us make history by re-electing the first Black woman ever to New York’s attorney general’s office.
| | |
---
Peter, last year, you helped us make history by re-electing the first Black woman ever to New York’s attorney general’s office.

Winning re-election was no easy feat. Not only was I up against someone who was heavily funded by far-right conspiracy theorists, I was also fighting against New York’s most powerful and corrupt forces who were all eager to see me fail.

**But together, as a team, we WON!** And now, as I look ahead to the long fight for progress and equality that awaits us in 2023, I hope I can continue to count on your support.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. Every donation I receive before midnight tonight – even as small as $5 – will activate your 2023 Founding Donor membership, so please: Will you help us get to 1,000 Founding Donors by donating right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56828801/386133061/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk943-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ5MTNjMS04ODhiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tSyzOoaCL0_B1HixSQ1dQQ-AitT38OXy4MwmEffHIxM=)

I’ll be honest, we have our work cut out for us in 2023. Because, even after a promising midterm election, millions of Americans are _still_ without access to reproductive health care, gun violence is _still_ ravaging our nation, and LBGTQ+ people are _still_ being threatened with violence.

Peter, now isn’t the time to pump the brakes on our fight for progress. Now is the time to keep the momentum going until we see _real_ change – and I vow to lead that charge into 2023.

**That’s why I’m calling on you today to recommit yourself to the fight for New York’s voiceless and vulnerable with me. Because you were one of my most engaged supporters from this past year, I decided to reach out to you personally, so please:

[Will you donate any amount to activate your 2023 Founding Donor membership?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56828804/386133064/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk943-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ5MTNjMS04ODhiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tSyzOoaCL0_B1HixSQ1dQQ-AitT38OXy4MwmEffHIxM=)**

body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoqigmd5prrfqbpdrn7ef4v8jt3u95ghlcvu7hfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcoj7cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2fsnu5ndrps5as0kc3v993iluc3pgi2rj5m0kb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcoj7cjh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo65j01qplmcuorn6a2s2e0p1gudlqb6m1lmvfe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcoj7cjh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0b1l7v2qdkc6m254q2otv74mmd238fjnr0hp3jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcoj7cjh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have hours before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6vjbimdblfneniq85vucajh1pnilbhhv9bkem9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcoj7cjh2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1f8nf20dovfom7j3oe1hkqk9qblu976uo2ja7i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmcoj7cjh2bs)**

---
Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: Great America Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7521%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=IXGBtdtTQOn1jcoFeI9MwA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78500%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fetYu0tBrljXE0XvFLKzCQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78500%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fetYu0tBrljXE0XvFLKzCQ&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78501%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lub7fYqWFPllMDOhpLIJUw&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7521%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=IXGBtdtTQOn1jcoFeI9MwA&sysid=1)_

body:
Hi D. P., How many times is unfinished business never addressed? Do you feel lost at board meetings? Do you feel your voice

| | Robert's Rules of Order Workshop Series starting on January 3rd running weekly through February 7th.
---
| | [](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/f9OLqhW4I/c?w=6pZH5SRf812Aepk_xx6MA4PFamuagPKVl8H7T3bjojo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhLmNvbS9zby9mOU9McWhXNEk_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJyIjoiMjYxN2JmMGItYjMxNi00NjNhLWZkMmMtNDNkNmUwZWYyZmZiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0)
---
| | Hi D. P., How many times is unfinished business never addressed? Do you feel lost at board meetings? Do you feel your voice is not being heard? Learn how to stand up for yourself and voice a concern or a motion. The application of parliamentary law is the best method yet devised to enable assemblies of any size, with due regard for every member's opinion, to arrive at the general will on the maximum number of questions of varying complexity in a minimum amount time and under all kinds of internal climate ranging from total harmony to hardened or impassioned division of opinion. Develop skills to be able to serve as a competent committee chairman or member. Develop skills to be able to function well as an organizational officer or member. Appreciate the importance of using a parliamentary authority in business and in your volunteer organizations. Assess the effectiveness of the meetings you conduct or attend.
---

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ot99stk3laojpdkb94coort3bsldtcrcmg0jd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfmnit9qeigc1mand1hfrd6c8vqh9otoffojao6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zopm448q7q3m4tp4h97ttufmm8rop6lra9664sqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4054o8cl0kr7d30o4bkjkcenec8f32kbvv51veg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqfl4ha6k25ud13dvqe9cdkbfpre7e5t6eso0e08_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf1hsgc0rj8v6tvlbl82303mruthcamm84df059o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zro7lkf8220fdk50adnpejko2hseg2odgr0m9m38_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuhjp9lagg9n5p8l2mi747nu29ji1mc9iuqggdc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zonja8nlukqq6h2pvvv8j9glpukaiuv05p0euisg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3j42g6cg6o7dh1b66n0s2vtg4an1dcr7htoi4f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrravim5h6o894r1leo4e7ld6fu7m179gklf1rl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qr2g2qes07267d42miut5d2t4h54bhas9qs1ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu1caftq8lft73phsr7kdios4pjfm9235g18ht90_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8a2nmedokk4637cpmanbaip12d6i65956j4b2n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z21j8modv58pf5ismqk7nrll1mt8i8366vju7vio_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zknitg962j74k6bgfbr9b03ji1cktoa3810plp5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt8d3m0lkqg3a6t7c047cakh136rep61c6optmto_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3jvfqv2e28pevvg6m7tij3oqjdsbei80ndm1i68_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8qk373310157ohkk9a4i6umju2ul8ivic4nqugg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgsadnpo67j5kjc5a3m7ng37t0qncsof4al4la5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhj22rareen0gn4063cs4ps7gmkpikkusaur9di8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2z00onrrd0p0c3dhsnio8q0ukj372530437j34pvg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zps3h1rsr0354r4i25gnpsrs0f2j3h7kh0o7m5mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm2pj1chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuu0lk9iogbg6tfgcer4n3cd2fkdihu9lam9pei8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm6pr2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zou54kui8q4cuq00avp8ma4b4liuv9lcsa3n23a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm6pr2c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0ciufip4mfmaq172tujj4q3tnkesso0elugla80_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthm6pr2c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---
