name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0396%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=i7iT71Fn38uBwjzdzEgYtg&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655583%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yJYEM59VH1oE3mHI7oQ22A&sysid=1)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655584%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bVEKQeTt6HVWtquv1D1rDA&sysid=1)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655595%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ss2hD5Dex6PWdTuDJ4Fzew&sysid=1)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655596%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NAWtqe7EmuslSqRiTN2tgw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655597%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EpeR%2bsVQFRmuOH%2bQeZZWAw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655598%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K4PKeAm04ljQXDK9B0V87Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655599%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pyKi%2b8e2i4rtUiac7uJ5PA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655590%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Glymzwy%2fU3X1VhSCaJUtuw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655591%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B6HzlmRH9x4R%2fHv%2fy6oOYw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655592%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B9wRj7Pzgm4PvDj%2fManFrg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655593%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I123jHN8GprAhlpNVODugw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655594%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6dWXhdgI0%2fqBioqDhH5xng&sysid=1)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655596%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NAWtqe7EmuslSqRiTN2tgw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655597%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EpeR%2bsVQFRmuOH%2bQeZZWAw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655598%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K4PKeAm04ljQXDK9B0V87Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655599%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pyKi%2b8e2i4rtUiac7uJ5PA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655590%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Glymzwy%2fU3X1VhSCaJUtuw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655591%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B6HzlmRH9x4R%2fHv%2fy6oOYw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655592%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B9wRj7Pzgm4PvDj%2fManFrg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655593%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I123jHN8GprAhlpNVODugw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655594%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6dWXhdgI0%2fqBioqDhH5xng&sysid=1)

People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?”

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_“If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0396%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=i7iT71Fn38uBwjzdzEgYtg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0396%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=i7iT71Fn38uBwjzdzEgYtg&sysid=1)

Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

None of this was true and we know that because of the pioneering work of Citizens for Responsibility & Ethics in Washington (CREW)._ [**_Can you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to CREW Today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84221b47-77c8-446b-9150-390a053c63ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Santos claimed he was Jewish. He's not. He said his mom was from Belgium. She's from Brazil. In Brazil, he was charged with forging checks and we're not even 100% sure at this point that he's a U.S. citizen. **_ Sadly, from Majorie Taylor Greene to Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz to Donald Trump, serial lying, conspiracy-mongering and even criminality are not shocking anymore. **_It will take more than winning races to secure our democracy, we must protect_**** _ its integrity from scammers, criminals, extremists and other malcontents who mostly assemble in today's GOP._**

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Farewell Council, Hello Congress!
body:
Peter, This is a bittersweet farewell to my constituents. I'm grateful to continue representing amazing people as Councilman, and now Congressman.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nhdtljd-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, This is a bittersweet farewell to my constituents. **I'm grateful to continue representing amazing people as Councilman, and _now Congressman_.** Tomorrow at 11:59 AM, I will resign from my position as Town of Hempstead Councilman.My grandfather always said, "leave things better than you found them" and working with CSEA Local 880 co-workers, department heads, and elected colleagues, both past and present - we did just that. I will work tirelessly for NY-04, alongside all government leaders in Nassau County to deliver for you.**Serving America's largest Town has been a true honor.** I've made lifelong friends, learned much, and hopefully left my mark. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. This isn't a goodbye, just a so long for now. **As your Congressman-Elect,
-> I will REPRESENT you.
-> I will WORK across the aisle to get things done.**Sincerely,
Anthony [DONATE NOW ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nhdtljd-iubikjttk-y/) [VISIT WEBSITE ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nhdtljd-iubikjttk-j/) | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-nhdtljd-iubikjttk-i/)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel?=
subject: 📌This is what I told Donald Trump😵🔥
body:
My meeting with the President... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/rachelhamm/this-is-what-i-told-donald-trump?e=5fa0631807)
---
| |
---
|
---
Rachel & Nikki. Nikki means "Victory of the people". I believe our victory in this nation will come byway of "we the people".
| |
# Happy New Year to you!!
As the New Year is upon us, I've been reflecting on 2022. I've experienced more blessings than I can count, and the Lord has shone His light on my path every step of the way. I'm looking back with gratitude and looking forward prayerfully.

It's been wonderful to see so many people standing up for what is right in 2022. It's been such an honor to meet so many amazing patriots along the campaign trail and beyond. I will never forget you and the support you've shown me and our country! God bless you!!

One of my favorite people that I met this year was
President Donald J. Trump. I got to speak with him for about 30 minutes. It's a meeting I'll never forget! He was charismatic, bold, and inquisitive. I liked him very much. I was told he liked me too. Something tells me that might not be the last time I meet with him. Wink, wink.
:)
---
|
---
Towards the end of my meeting with President Trump I told him, "I really need to work for you." He reached over, touched my arm, and said, "Oh, you will. You will."
| **As I prayerfully look forward into 2023, one my goals from 2022 remains: to bring election integrity to California and the country. While running for Secretary of State this past year, I investigated our election systems, and I'm gravely concerned about my findings. You might have concerns as well.

Looking into this next year, this is what I'm sensing: _It's going to be the best of times and the worst of times_. Globalists have the goal of turning our Republic into one piece of the new world order. They think in terms of the state over the individual, their power over our rights, and medical tyranny over bodily autonomy. Thus, "the worst of times".

So where will the "best of times" come from? Simply put: God, and His people _rising up_!

We do not have time to sit back and let things "play out". It is time for a revolution. A revolution that resists globalism, tyranny, and godlessness. It's time for patriots and saints to exercise the authority the Bible and US Constitution give us. To be clear: I am NOT calling for violence. I don't want the FBI to come calling _again_!

So I have a question for you:_What is your role in the revolution?_

One of my current roles in the revolution is to bring you political and spiritual inspiration, information, tools, and strategies through my show.

If you're not already subscribed to The Rachel Hamm Show, head over to your platform of choice and hit "subscribe". Be sure to also click on the little "bell icon" to be notified when a new episode is released. Subscribe & view The Rachel Hamm Show on:

clean_body: My meeting with the President... | | | | | | Rachel & Nikki. Nikki means "Victory of the people". I believe our victory in this nation will come byway of "we the people". | | Happy New Year to you!! As the New Year is upon us, I've been reflecting on 2022. I've experienced more blessings than I can count, and the Lord has shone His light on my path every step of the way. I'm looking back with gratitude and looking forward prayerfully. It's been wonderful to see so many people standing up for what is right in 2022. It's been such an honor to meet so many amazing patriots along the campaign trail and beyond. I will never forget you and the support you've shown me and our country! God bless you!! One of my favorite people that I met this year was President Donald J. Trump. I got to speak with him for about 30 minutes. It's a meeting I'll never forget! He was charismatic, bold, and inquisitive. I liked him very much. I was told he liked me too. Something tells me that might not be the last time I meet with him. Wink, wink. :) | Towards the end of my meeting with President Trump I told him, "I really need to work for you." He reached over, touched my arm, and said, "Oh, you will. You will." | As I prayerfully look forward into 2023, one my goals from 2022 remains: to bring election integrity to California and the country. While running for Secretary of State this past year, I investigated our election systems, and I'm gravely concerned about my findings. You might have concerns as well. Looking into this next year, this is what I'm sensing: It's going to be the best of times and the worst of times. Globalists have the goal of turning our Republic into one piece of the new world order. They think in terms of the state over the individual, their power over our rights, and medical tyranny over bodily autonomy. Thus, "the worst of times". So where will the "best of times" come from? Simply put: God, and His people rising up! We do not have time to sit back and let things "play out". It is time for a revolution. A revolution that resists globalism, tyranny, and godlessness. It's time for patriots and saints to exercise the authority the Bible and US Constitution give us. To be clear: I am NOT calling for violence. I don't want the FBI to come calling again! So I have a question for you:What is your role in the revolution? One of my current roles in the revolution is to bring you political and spiritual inspiration, information, tools, and strategies through my show. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmer7uhob2335l1o73r3t8t3gls690sgfi4g4kg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjb2r1rqv94q1hteqhrk4j71amfa93r79pvfvft0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ptc9tqlgcpsm2p3sh78og07n3b0v3a4tu85p1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zub0adm7em7r3n6pfahh1gj7b1khm5tu8prv19s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm4trc4m69hrrc5va06hu26i1b1m6ra5u5q4ufpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk7s7lcm8t7ijfi65lch2e924npu5ds8agbbi3do_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zihqa14nhca3rm2tu86qpm09rm4lqvvv0qnuc88o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zod0k0vsqhtu9fmpqhbed8jsu4a15br59ge59n00_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo043cvnm4s3n99a2c4me73dbgmmvj8078bjm2po_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbg6h52qdj2higmsj1fraie32p7040j55h57rrvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zosnv2mjqtb4uk83rchvb6hgo8n4ie68rmhptbbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb9ce90ckdtvjkumgv0jdm0cvk9svf74ngdh65pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z113tqh370un2rs99hbf0b8th246af49iidc6250_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zac2kuaqrs6edctsptdts7rm6om637a07cto8k6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjaqe3lqjlp2cqc26ha3c1d1p98silqf2i9ckok0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvurl44qs82etan8gaukt6gasghbl4r1r2egos4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpdqak92etr8dvqjiaul93pt8c70nihkcf7iugsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhtoqf1l65tfinpcib9sgdvr4psqgj3a6n3j40n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgqmrfmdcfhloed03hhgvk6kuvhmkb09nnejsmjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq3ftoafr86e8jpj2q95m67hm505jhvee8djh1co_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z80s2b7sufnhidk3n7a41921rp9947qu8uv0snm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z5898289t91v2u5n7635qmutq48tb67cucg8hr20).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8fta0gqkj72ma8220ve5cb53kbqlh8gl0va2da0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo7ler97eurm1t0sqjr7pbvithdeohn2l6u4t4ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3o4o01k8j20tpc1d4rkrkbtognk0ntbujkr2vq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c5h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqe33vo2srvprci02kvher7mhqmes2913un1egu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cthmep74c5h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

Friend,

_This is URGENT._

Donald J. Trump’s FIRST RALLY of his 2024 Campaign will be his most HISTORIC one ever, and he wants YOU to win a VIP experience.

If you win this ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME trip:
_**We’ll cover your flights and your hotel, you’ll get VIP tickets to the rally, and you’ll get to bring a guest of your choice. But the best part is, you’ll even get to meet ME, and we’ll take a photo together to commemorate this moment _FOREVER_. **_
There’s no other Patriot that Donald J. Trump wants to meet more than YOU.

subject: Al Qaeda Plans Plane Attacks Using “New Techniques and Tactics” as Air Marshals Keep Getting Sent to Mexican Border
body:
While the nation’s Federal Air Marshals (FAM) are busy on the Mexican border providing illegal immigrants with welfare checks, transportation, and other basic services, Al Qaeda is planning attacks in the U.S. involving planes, according to high-level Department of Homeland Security (DHS) sources.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 2, 2023
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28651&F=H&) | **[Al Qaeda Plans Plane Attacks Using “New Techniques and Tactics” as Air Marshals Keep Getting Sent to Mexican Border](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28651&F=H&)** While the nation’s Federal Air Marshals (FAM) are busy on the Mexican border providing illegal immigrants with welfare checks, transportation, and other basic services, Al Qaeda is planning attacks in the U.S. involving planes, according to high-level Department of Homeland Security (DHS) sources. Judicial Watch obtained from government sources a copy of the new intelligence alert, which was delivered on December 31, 2022, at 12:23:52 Greenwich Mean Time. The caption of the widely circulated warning reads: “Al-Qaeda says upcoming attacks on US, possibly involving planes, will use new techniques and tactics.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28651&F=H&)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28646&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==) | **[Judicial Watch and New York City Settle Federal Lawsuit on Voter Registration Clean-Up after City Removes 441,083 Ineligible Names from Voter Rolls](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28646&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==)** The Judicial Watch lawsuit detailed that New York City’s “own recent data concedes that there were only 22 total” removals under this provision “during a six-year period, in a city of over 5.5 million voters. These are ludicrously small numbers of removals given the sizable populations of these counties.” Moreover, the “almost complete failure of Kings, Queens, New York, Bronx, and Richmond Counties, over a period of at least six years, to remove voters” under a key provision of federal law “means that there are untold numbers of New York City registrations for voters who are ineligible to vote at their listed address because they have changed residence or are otherwise ineligible to vote.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28646&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==)

Steal $20 Mil in U.S. COVID Relief Funds](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGFja2Vycy1zdGVhbC0yMC1taWwtaW4tY292aWQtcmVsaWVmLWZ1bmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)** Nearly a year after Judicial Watch launched an investigation into the theft of U.S. COVID relief funds by foreign hackers, the Secret Service confirms that cyber criminals connected to China’s government stole $20 million in benefits. This includes Small Business Administration (SBA) loans and unemployment insurance money in multiple states, according to a national news story that identifies the perpetrators as a APT41, a hacking group based in Chengdu. The report cites U.S. law enforcement officials and cybersecurity experts who believe the multi-million-dollar theft of government pandemic funds by the Chinese faction “may just be the tip of the iceberg.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGFja2Vycy1zdGVhbC0yMC1taWwtaW4tY292aWQtcmVsaWVmLWZ1bmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

### [Biden Admin to Drop Half a Million on Artificial Intelligence That Detects Microaggressions on Social Media ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28611&F=H&) The Washington Free Beacon The Biden administration’s funding of the research comes as the White House faces growing accusations that it seeks to suppress free speech online. Biden last month suggested there should be an investigation into Tesla CEO Elon Musk’s acquisition of Twitter after the billionaire declared the social media app would pursue a “free speech” agenda. Internal Twitter communications Musk released this month also revealed a prolonged relationship between the FBI and Twitter employees, with the agency playing a regular role in the platform’s content moderation. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28611&F=H&)

### [Judicial Watch Sues Air Force Academy for Records on Critical Race Theory, ‘White Supremacy’ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28612&F=H&) CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Defense Department because it has failed to release documents concerning “Critical Race Theory” and “white supremacy,” reportedly being taught at the Air Force Academy. The academy is overseen by the Defense Department. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61643&L=28612&F=H&)

These are ludicrously small numbers of removals given the sizable populations of these counties.” Moreover, the “almost complete failure of Kings, Queens, New York, Bronx, and Richmond Counties, over a period of at least six years, to remove voters” under a key provision of federal law “means that there are untold numbers of New York City registrations for voters who are ineligible to vote at their listed address because they have changed residence or are otherwise ineligible to vote.” == ---|--- | | | | = | = “These shocking documents forced out by a Judicial Watch lawsuit show the Biden administration effectively trafficking unaccompanied alien children, dropping them off in city after city like items for delivery,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Biden open borders crisis is resulting in the most massive child and human trafficking operation ever.” = ---|--- | | | | | Nearly a year after Judicial Watch launched an investigation into the theft of U.S. COVID relief funds by foreign hackers, the Secret Service confirms that cyber criminals connected to China’s government stole $20 million in benefits. This includes Small Business Administration (SBA) loans and unemployment insurance money in multiple states, according to a national news story that identifies the perpetrators as a APT41, a hacking group based in Chengdu. The report cites U.S. law enforcement officials and cybersecurity experts who believe the multi-million-dollar theft of government pandemic funds by the Chinese faction “may just be the tip of the iceberg.” ---|--- | | | = The New York Post “[First son] Hunter’s laptop and other evidence show Biden’s record of converting his public office into private gain,” said Tom Fitton, president of the conservative transparency group Judicial Watch. “So it is no surprise Biden is getting a free luxury vacation from a wealthy donor who ‘coincidentally’ received primo White House state dinner tickets.” = = The Washington Free Beacon The Biden administration’s funding of the research comes as the White House faces growing accusations that it seeks to suppress free speech online. Biden last month suggested there should be an investigation into Tesla CEO Elon Musk’s acquisition of Twitter after the billionaire declared the social media app would pursue a “free speech” agenda. Internal Twitter communications Musk released this month also revealed a prolonged relationship between the FBI and Twitter employees, with the agency playing a regular role in the platform’s content moderation. = = CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Defense Department because it has failed to release documents concerning “Critical Race Theory” and “white supremacy,” reportedly being taught at the Air Force Academy. The academy is overseen by the Defense Department. = | CLIPS | | | == | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved = |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Stunning violations of party platform, postal regulations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party
body:
Amidst calls for IL GOP Chairman Don Tracy to step down, new revelations show that IL GOP leadership approved pro-choice mailers in DuPage County.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/48210c79b139/breaking-stunning-violations-of-party-platform-postal-regulations?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Violates Party Platform, Pays for and Endorses Pro-Choice Mailer During 2022 Midterm Election (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-violates-party-platform-pays-for-and-endorses-pro-choice-mailer-during-2022-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In 2018, Republican DuPage County Board member Greg Hart, Dist. 3 ran on a pro-life platform. That same year, Hart even received the endorsement (https://prolifeaction.org/wp-content/uploads/Illinois-Right-to-Life-Action-2018-Voter-Guide.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of the Illinois Right to Life Action as a county board candidate.

But in 2022, as a Republican candidate for DuPage County Board Chairman, Hart had a change of heart – literally, only this time he was running as a pro-choice, pro-women’s rights candidate, indicating a major shift in policy in just four years.

In October, Hart’s wife Alex released a
campaign video (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8YMOsIy5Q4o&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) saying,

“As DuPage chairman, Greg won’t change our laws supporting a woman’s right to choose, and he will always support women’s health.”

And in a mailer that went out to DuPage County residents just a month before the November election, Alex Hart again reiterated that her husband,

“will always protect women’s rights and never restrict our right to choose.”

The problem with the mailer? The mailer was “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party.”

That’s right, the Illinois Republican Party not only endorsed Hart’s pro-choice mailer, they even attached their name to it and paid for it.

============================================================

Not only is this wrong, it contradicts the ** Illinois Republican Party Platform (https://illinois.gop/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/2020PlatformoftheIllinoisRepublicanParty.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, which was adopted on October 3, 2020.

“We believe that our natural rights, as enshrined in the U.S. Constitution and the Declaration of Independence, begin at conception and continue until natural death.”

We support a human life amendment to the federal and Illinois constitutions affirming the right to life of unborn children, and we support making clear that the Fourteenth Amendment’s protections apply to unborn children.”

The document goes on to say that,

“We advocate the overturning of Roe v. Wade.”

But the most interesting part of the platform is the conclusion, which states,

“This Platform is that of the Illinois Republican Party. While we acknowledge and respect reasonable differences in opinion and discussion among Illinois Republicans, candidates for, elected public officials of, and party officials of the Illinois GOP, all shall endeavor to support the platform and uphold its planks.”

Hard to “support the platform and uphold its planks” when the IL GOP supports and endorses pro-choice candidates – a direct contradiction of its very own platform.

Republican DuPage County Board member Greg Hart showing off his COVID-19 vaccination card while wearing a mask.

The fact that the Illinois Republican Party sent out a pro-choice mailer should enrage every freedom-loving patriot and it’s yet another reason why it’s time for IL GOP chairman Don Tracy to go.

We’re hearing that the Democratic Party of Illinois misses their
** 2002 Democratic candidate for State Senate (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
. Perhaps Tracy is a better fit there than he is here.

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

** IL GOP Weaponized Postage Discount to Attack Conservative Candidates During Primary (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Last ** February (https://www.theillinoize.com/articles/some-gop-operatives-believe-irvin?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, IL GOP chairman Don Tracy was under pressure to respond to rumors swirling around conservative political circles about the Richard Irvin for governor campaign taking over the IL GOP.

“The Illinois Republican Party has been neutral and will always be neutral in the GOP primary for governor. Any accusation that we are coordinating with a particular campaign is absolutely false and I find it personally offensive to suggest otherwise.”

But Illinois Review would prove eight months later that Tracy’s statement denying that the IL GOP was
** colluding (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
with the Irvin campaign, was a total lie.

In
** exclusive audio (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
recently obtained by Illinois Review, Tracy admitted during a July meeting with conservative leaders that the Irvin campaign for governor was allowed to use the IL GOP postage discount for mailers – a perk not afforded to other candidates for governor during the primary.

Tracy acknowledges use of the postage discount in the recording, but says the IL GOP was taking its “direction from the House Caucus and the Senate Caucus.”

In other words, House GOP Minority Leader Jim Durkin and Senate GOP Minority Leader Dan McConchie controlled who could use the party’s non-profit postage discount for mailers, and Tracy simply followed their lead.

Illinois Review doesn’t accept that assertion, given that, while Durkin and McConchie were leaders of their caucuses, Tracy was the leader of the party – and therefore, the one ultimately in charge of the postage discount.

After all, the “non-profit” postage discount is a perk afforded to the IL GOP for official business – and no one else.

And while senior IL GOP leaders deny usage of the postage discount in support of Irvin, no one is willing to provide evidence to prove otherwise.

And that is why Illinois Review has publicly called for the US Postal Service to
** audit the IL GOP (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/illinois-review-its-time-for-the-u-s-postal-service-to-audit-the-il-gop-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, again – a suggestion that has senior IL GOP officials irate and in panic mode, according to several sources over the weekend.

But in addition to
** undeniable evidence (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
of the IL GOP colluding with the Irvin campaign during the primary, Illinois Review has learned some other disturbing information: the IL GOP was weaponizing their postage discount to attack conservative candidates during the primary.

And in some cases, the IL GOP was taking sides in open primaries and mailing vicious mailers attacking conservative Republican grassroots opponents on behalf of their preferred establishment-backed candidates.

Last week,
** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-il-gop-postage-discount-on-mailer-attacking-trump-republican-candidate-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
reported that the IL GOP’s postage discount was applied to a mailer sent out on behalf of IL Republican State Rep. Tim Butler’s campaign, attacking his fellow Republican grassroots primary opponent Kent Gray – who was challenging Butler in the IL House Dist. 95 Republican primary race.

Butler was a close ally of Durkin, and in 2019, Durkin appointed Butler
** Assistant House Minority Leader (https://mptimes-herald.com/rep-butler-named-house-assistant-minority-leader-for-nd-general-assembl-p14454-171.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
. He was reappointed in 2021.

Kent Gray, an attorney, was Multi-State Director in Illinois and Missouri for Donald J. Trump for President in 2015, and in 2020, he was co-chairman of the Illinois Trump Finance Committee. Gray had the support of conservative grassroots leaders, including State Sen. Darren Bailey – an opponent of Irvin in the IL primary for governor.

But since the publication of that article, many more candidates have come forward with similar stories of the IL GOP abusing the postage discount in favor of their preferred candidates in the primary.

Illinois Review also has reason to believe that Bailey’s endorsement list became a “hit list” for the IL GOP, where they targeted 7 of the 10 candidates that he endorsed during the primary with negative mailers “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” on behalf of their preferred, GOP establishment-backed candidates.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Don Debolt, a Republican conservative grassroots candidate ** backed by Bailey (https://www.instagram.com/p/Ce9CDWxL0ax/?utm_source=ig_embed&utm_campaign=loading&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, was running for State Senate in the 54th District primary against incumbent Republican Sen. Steve McClure, who in ** 2021 (https://www.sj-r.com/story/news/2021/01/19/mcclure-appointed-senate-gop-leadership-role/4203371001/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
was appointed Assistant Republican Leader for the Senate Republican Caucus and Assistant Floor Leader by then Senate GOP Minority Leader Dan McConchie.

The mailer, sent out in support of McClure, and “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party,” called Debolt a “liar,” for challenging McClure’s record as an Illinois Senate GOP leader.
A copy of a mailer “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” attacking Republican conservative grassroots candidate Don Debolt during the 2022 Illinois Primary.

So much for Tracy reminding Republicans about obeying Ronald Reagan’s ** 11th Commandment (https://prairiestatewire.com/stories/622442065-tracy-please-appropriately-remind-your-friends-and-candidates-of-the-11th-commandment-as-needed?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, “Thou shalt not speak ill of another Republican,” when his own organization is viciously attacking conservative Republicans during the primary.

In the 93rd House District primary race, Travis Weaver – a conservative, grassroots Republican candidate backed by Bailey was running against incumbent Republican State Rep. Mark Luft, who was backed by Durkin.

The mailer, “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” attacked Weaver, calling him a “Chicago liberal” and accusing him, saying that “he is not a Republican..he’s not one of us.” The attack mailer also photoshopped a photo of Weaver with disgraced former Democratic House Speaker Mike Madigan.

** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Copy of a mailer “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” attacking Republican conservative grassroots candidate Travis Weaver and linking him to disgraced Democratic House Speaker Mike Madigan during the 2022 Illinois Primary.

Another mailer deliberately deceived voters by photoshopping a picture of Weaver and Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker, saying he “shares the same insider circles as JB Pritzker and Mike Madigan.” The same mailer also proclaimed that Weaver is “not a real Republican...he’s not one of us.”

A copy of a mailer attacking Republican conservative grassroots candidate Travis Weaver during the 2022 Illinois Primary, using a fake photo with Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker during the 2022 Illinois Primary.

Weaver followed up proving that the photo with Pritzker was photoshopped, and a total lie to trick Republican voters.
Republican conservative grassroots candidate Travis Weaver proves that the photo used in an attack mailer is fake, during the 2022 Illinois Primary.

So much for Tracy reminding Republicans about obeying Ronald Reagan’s ** 11th Commandment, (https://prairiestatewire.com/stories/622442065-tracy-please-appropriately-remind-your-friends-and-candidates-of-the-11th-commandment-as-needed?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
“Thou shalt not speak ill of another Republican,” when his own organization is viciously attacking conservative Republicans during the primary.

In the 87h House District primary race – a brand new district this past cycle, Illinois Review has learned that senior IL GOP leaders got involved in an open primary, backing former Tazwell County Treasurer Mary Burress over conservative grassroots candidate Dr. Bill Hauter.

Both
** Durkin (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByCommittees.aspx?txtCmteName=z1qm%2fjBmJWoB5ThTcWcMdkGe%2fHjKdSPwGWHts2LUlss%3d&ddlCmteNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and a ** PAC run by GOP State Rep. Avery Bourne (https://peoriastandard.com/stories/627805424-durkin-chicago-republicans-back-burress-with-campaign-cash-in-87th-house-race?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, who was Irvin’s statewide running mate, donated to Burress.

And during the primary, Burress pledged to publicly support Durkin as House GOP leader. Hauter did not.

It’s problematic for IL GOP leaders to get involved in Republican primary races – essentially putting their thumb on the scale to tip the balance in favor of their preferred candidate. The preferential treatment angered many Republicans, including Jeanne Ives, who in June posted on her
** Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/100002083913086/posts/pfbid02umoD9KtzpsdPp2Tbh7u5t7eBv8SZQfmhcc4XkhUYZkLWdaw93cstbLnH47kPwaKwl/?mibextid=cr9u03&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“Why are a bunch of DuPage Republicans and the Chicagoland Unions getting involved in an Open Primary race a hundred miles away in Central Illinois?

This is a safe Republican district, so the winner in the Primary will more than likely win the General. Note to Republicans in HD 87 – Select a representative that will represent you and not just establishment party “leaders.” In this safe Republican seat, you deserve someone who will speak up for your district and not fall in line behind tax increases and bad budgets like Durkin and Avery both did.”

In addition to Weaver, Gray, Debolt, and Hauter, Illinois Review is aware of the IL GOP going after three more conservative candidates during the primary – all backed by Bailey: Jed Davis (75th House Dist.), Jennifer Korte (112th House Dist.) and Win Stoller (37th Senate Dist.).

If there was ever a case for the removal of Don Tracy as chairman of the Republican Party of Illinois – this is it. Under his watch, the IL GOP not only offered postage discounts to their preferred primary candidates, but they put their name on mailers viciously attacking conservative Republican candidates.

This is unacceptable and Illinois Review is calling on the Republican State Central Committee to remove Tracy as chairman. What other evidence do you need? And any Republican SSC member that does not call for Tracy’s removal – then they are proving that they are part of the problem.

What say you,

Tim Ozinga, 1st. Dist.
Judy Diekelman, 2nd Dist.
Jeanne Ives, 3rd Dist.
Jay Reyes, 4th Dist.
Aaron Del Mar, 5th Dist.
Sean Morrison, 6th Dist.
Mark Hosty, 7th Dist.
Dean White, 8th Dist.
Joan Lasonde, 9th Dist.
Mark Shaw, 10th Dist.
Laura Pollastrini, 11th Dist.
Rhonda Belford, 12th Dist.
Tim Butler, 13th Dist.
Larry Smith, 14th Dist.
Jason Plummer, 15th Dist.
Jan Weber, 16th Dist.
Chad Weaver, 17th Dist.

It’s no wonder Republicans can’t win in Illinois – the IL GOP is too busy attacking fellow Republicans instead of the Democrats. Now it’s up to the State Central Committee to decide.

The choice is yours – who’s side are you on?
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=adcb6a7c6a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_03_02_52&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-adcb6a7c6a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Families deserve the power to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj2ebm1s16rjllcst4ntdbabj9l6f8smg3shsstg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm4ob6cth2bs)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1gi2ubk25dl8r24slg91nbu02fg1075k9728vv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm4ob6cth2bs)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE - _and kids deserve better_ - [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfb395mrdn77roep16u1nud3kataqqpvrb83oc6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm4ob6cth2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmcv9ae317jl2ha6vrqu5q2qosd3lfahrtd24crg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm4ob6cth2bs)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America. **Some of the Education Freedom Pledge 's top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis

Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE! Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend? Here is the pledge ... | | " I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. ---

Friend,

The reason I ran for office in the first place was to represent the people of Iowa and to try and solve issues to the best of my ability.

We’ve got more issues than you can shake a stick at going on in our country right now. I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I would love to know which is most important to you.

So, if you could, would you mind taking the one question survey below to let me know what issue is most important to you, and what issue I should focus my efforts on **IMMEDIATELY?**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=0559c7b1c0ae4d56a702f2992f0959f2&_e=LldCVQPR7MosQ7QVBp_Xy3S2iyUeGPgS8T_j7WUNcv1qGx4BDmt1d9LNjYOWKlBLmt4LHMJlQkmkJyXs4oYgokK5Xuwhcj2dd9p9Xk1DjiI8fLv2hFIpcRPtdLnSBpW-LI-6yIpyNQ5d2jvyYeHUkMJJTVAVPTPSgKeN4q1IzyuLtcQ_bfrnkp6oqzp7uMaocSzjPtSNW7lnOr8CBdOHzL3ktpBIPYicRrKFaB_jFc1jnvfp2smpRpubBYERN1_tPHquDdv5G1a0_2Xr8174FkaWtPuXu-qcWPhMD3Y1VnN2SkUUX8vzv8KPrBkU_hmp87eWoUklz2VcECAoNgf2OhcQ-lGKswtbRSm3uUsUA_46v7jteZ1udawxE28l1-ZDyym9tisgtRYW34O1B84e_m_w3XZjMwWexz4aRxWxbht2tA8s187DrGemB86S7pjJoSmdwducddc9y9t3xw0QHng14TDj5B4OihcDF3xfheY%3D)
---

I’m going to fight for you and for solutions to all these issues, but I just want to know where to focus my energy the most right now.

Thank you for letting me serve you.

God Bless,

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Let’s start 2023 off strong!
body:
The New Year is finally here, and while we get ready to kick off our America First agenda, I need your help to start this year off strong!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZ8cC-CDzmTLPzbH7F3wAuFd0UFaeL6Zh_tWFktM-ZbXt5mHQD9AnE4DG9msuz-tJYCtPsPzkA3b3MLFi3KeRZeZ5kUjdDMuHXDMGUO8coz_yvl-Ip9wBxDjud2xGUnKiE91w3DV_f6H1p8SqCqRYKbbrRJiv-e5_k2Ka4P7Elp6NjXDCRIyVmsLqOigUzgmcnpy0WN8Unw5GAbCqudEqpprdd45aws&c=sdri8gmU-Y3jAT50_AKj9RwsmrzhIlvKYc1PkU47UhAkM60mEyipGA==&ch=oInMi5ltwGwrHCXFKQddlYvilvngyNmvxj9exk1zA4Rybq2yAu0OLg==)
---
| Friend
The New Year is finally here, and while we get ready to kick off our America First agenda, I need your help to start this year off strong!
This year is our chance to finally end the crises and bring help back to the American people, and we're ready to do it in three main ways.
First, Republicans are committed to bringing down prices. We know that Americans can't get by when they're paying outrageous prices for electricity, gas, and groceries. That's why it's one of our top priorities to bring energy independence and less spending back to our country!
Our second priority is ending the wave of violent crime and taking back our streets. We're ready to ensure that our police and border patrol have everything they need to keep us safe, and that starts by ensuring they have the funding and recruitment they need to do their jobs!
Finally, it's long past time since we secured our Southern Border. For nearly two years, Biden has encouraged illegal immigration, and after MILLIONS of attempted entries last year, the need to defend our national security has never been higher!
---
| | [HELP MAKE 2023 A HUGE SUCCESS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001omZ8cC-CDzmTLPzbH7F3wAuFd0UFaeL6Zh_tWFktM-ZbXt5mHQD9AnE4DG9msuz-tJYCtPsPzkA3b3MLFi3KeRZeZ5kUjdDMuHXDMGUO8coz_yvl-Ip9wBxDjud2xGUnKiE91w3DV_f6H1p8SqCqRYKbbrRJiv-e5_k2Ka4P7Elp6NjXDCRIyVmsLqOigUzgmcnpy0WN8Unw5GAbCqudEqpprdd45aws&c=sdri8gmU-Y3jAT50_AKj9RwsmrzhIlvKYc1PkU47UhAkM60mEyipGA==&ch=oInMi5ltwGwrHCXFKQddlYvilvngyNmvxj9exk1zA4Rybq2yAu0OLg==)

clean_body: The New Year is finally here, and while we get ready to kick off our America First agenda, I need your help to start this year off strong! | | | | == | Friend The New Year is finally here, and while we get ready to kick off our America First agenda, I need your help to start this year off strong! This year is our chance to finally end the crises and bring help back to the American people, and we're ready to do it in three main ways. First, Republicans are committed to bringing down prices. We know that Americans can't get by when they're paying outrageous prices for electricity, gas, and groceries. That's why it's one of our top priorities to bring energy independence and less spending back to our country! Our second priority is ending the wave of violent crime and taking back our streets. We're ready to ensure that our police and border patrol have everything they need to keep us safe, and that starts by ensuring they have the funding and recruitment they need to do their jobs! Finally, it's long past time since we secured our Southern Border. For nearly two years, Biden has encouraged illegal immigration, and after MILLIONS of attempted entries last year, the need to defend our national security has never been higher! | | == | There's so much to look forward to in 2023, and while my colleagues and I get ready to unleash our agenda, we must ensure that we have the resources to stay ahead of the curve. Friend == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | For Florida and America, | == | Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: We're Headed Into a New Year and We're Fired Up and Ready to Go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
January 3, 2022
Dear friend,
As we begin the New Year, we are laser-focused on several races for 2023, including the races for Memphis Mayor and the Memphis City Council. We want to make sure that we identify candidates in as many 2023 races as possible who understand the issues that matter to everyday residents. We want candidates who will fight for those issues.
We’re planning to identify and support candidates that support more funding for transit, to give just one example. More than 20,000 residents take a bus every day in Memphis and Shelby County. They use our public transit system to get to work, to get to the doctor’s office, and to get around town.
Don’t worry, there’s much more to come.
But, as we prepare for this next year and begin to identify the issues that we will measuring candidates against, we know we are going to need your help. Please use the button below to spread the word to your contacts. Also, if you can afford to, please consider chipping in a contribution to help our efforts [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] .
All the best to all of you,
Lee Harris
Shelby County Mayor
Founder of Tennessee Voter Project
SUPPORT TVP AS WE GET FIRED UP FOR THE 2023 RACES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]

name: Jake Ellzey, Navy Fighter Pilot (Ret.)
subject: Not asking for your money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
I'm nothing special - just a God-fearing American like you.
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62152605:63r-0wGNA:m:1:3331421248:D09F3585EB9C7C4E6601FDE4A8A8FD62:r)
---
* * *
Peter - I'm not asking for your money today.

There's plenty of emails going around that do that.
**[All I'm asking for today is your endorsement.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62152605:63r-0wGNA:m:1:3331421248:D09F3585EB9C7C4E6601FDE4A8A8FD62:r "All I’m asking for today is your endorsement. ")**

You don't know me, but I'm **retired Navy Fighter Pilot, Jake Ellzey, from Texas. **

_I 'm nothing special - just a God-fearing American like you._

After growing up here in Texas, I joined the Navy and became a fighter pilot. I served on the USS Ronald Reagan, was deployed nine times, including to Afghanistan and Iraq -- _and did five combat tours by air and one on the ground with SEAL team 5._

**And I 'm also the GOP candidate in the nation's biggest race in must-win Texas-06. **

I'm not one who ever brags, but my 20 years serving our nation in the skies was the greatest honor of my life.

And after I retired from the service, I went home to Texas to raise my family.

But after seeing the American Dream being put in danger by big-government politicians and the DC elites, I said enough was enough and _I decided to serve my country and again run as a conservative Republican for Congress._

**I couldn 't sit by and watch the clueless Washington liberals and the know-nothings in the media run this nation into the ground.**

The Democrats and the woke business fat-cats have all the money, connections, and influence they need to control every part of our life. They look down at people like you and me.

At the same time, they are driving our country into the ground: _soaring prices, open borders, indoctrinating our kids, gas prices so high you need a mortgage to fill your tank._

That's why I'm running.

**[And that's why I'm humbly asking if you will join me and endorse my campaign today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62152605:63r-0wGNA:m:1:3331421248:D09F3585EB9C7C4E6601FDE4A8A8FD62:r "And that’s
why I’m humbly asking if you will join me and endorse my campaign today?")**

I know you get bombarded with these emails asking for your money. I know that campaigns tell you you've betrayed them or shame you into donating. I won't do that.

_You and I are the same:_ We love America and believe in this country. And together, we will turn things around.
---
| | [ENDORSE A FIGHTER PILOT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62152605:63r-0wGNA:m:1:3331421248:D09F3585EB9C7C4E6601FDE4A8A8FD62:r)
---

Thank you for reading this. Your support means everything to me.

Jake Ellzey
Ret. Navy Fighter Pilot
Texas 6th Congressional District
---
|
---
| Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
---

name: Vernon Jones
subject: Mike Collins Lied To The People Of Georgia's 10th Congressional District In His First Vote For Speaker
body:
| | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Mike Collins Lied To The People Of Georgia's 10th Congressional District In His First Vote For Speaker
---
|
---
| -January 3rd, 2023-
On Thursday, September 16, 2021, "at a packed campaign kickoff in Jackson, Collins, son of former congressman Mac Collins, promised to stand up to "liberal left-wing wackos, RINOS, elites -- and even the Republican establishment," including Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-Calif.), promising to vote against him becoming Speaker of the House if Republicans take control of the chamber in 2023."And if by some odd chance he becomes Speaker and he doesn't want to give me a committee assignment, then I'm fine with that," he said. [See article](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B8ajFZJs0lvkZOSKwXvhCWpGBNzQwJW6l3D24M1pMQqHBdhDJU4a-n3r3U4GspDlReifLYGTV5NOWE03GS1vpJ3XC4D3vG6gDBEkTfW3O3RwPPSV2Fi2CM8pZ3Y9alIkICYKdodmy7X4ufnGDTbJfZSm5_cdJBQ8rxsYUEVQREXqzmNG5-0L1ZZ8VqxhxSsJxnanNGIMxQC0v2VTDV08QdZlR1GHEkoakzJJzO3FT_6S8LU_qpwfI8dxGPtWBHZyaWbYbwVr1hw=&c=cRyWSkOuN7N9WOAJkt8k5b_38tYE7MFkCiWU6iBoQc60KfqyV8hkew==&ch=XaEfEcFfmSEkQ7bH4CclNhQrTr_G5dAC78rfzgSMZ4zMnucoLEZRgQ==).

"Mike Collins is a chameleon. Mike Collins called Kevin McCarthy an establishment RINO that he couldn't vote for, but he did. [See video.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B8ajFZJs0lvkZOSKwXvhCWpGBNzQwJW6l3D24M1pMQqHBdhDJU4a-n3r3U4GspDlhoBuMdKFT5B3_HUTlOXMvZp8-esQktF-sxoOcDLlpuIJsKLEUV3mIZrGwV7DW_dToDmB5EDBlIkTl0SgiF4--j5T_S2JTSdPQ-HAUSdOfSOMJLC7Vqvcnn5wbMFdFgKbkpIh68_TKLlWgNS7LpEqgA==&c=cRyWSkOuN7N9WOAJkt8k5b_38tYE7MFkCiWU6iBoQc60KfqyV8hkew==&ch=XaEfEcFfmSEkQ7bH4CclNhQrTr_G5dAC78rfzgSMZ4zMnucoLEZRgQ==) Collins faked right, but he ran left to California. I told everyone Mike was a liberal." said former State Representative Vernon Jones.

"Mike Collins is a chameleon. Mike Collins called Kevin McCarthy an establishment RINO that he couldn't vote for, but he did. == Collins faked right, but he ran left to California. I told everyone Mike was a liberal." said former State Representative Vernon Jones. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: shocking defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter, I can hardly believe my eyes – I just watched House Republicans plunge into utter chaos on the House floor.

Minutes ago, extreme MAGA Republicans failed to vote for a Speaker of the House for the first time in decades.

Let me repeat that: Kevin McCarthy’s own Republicans just rejected him – proving House Republicans are fighting themselves instead of fighting for the people.

**This changes everything for Democrats. We now have a huge opportunity to step in and show what we can do – _but only if we move quickly to prove our numbers._**

body:
On behalf of the Ohio Democratic Party, we just wanted to take a moment to say: Thank you.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56844072/386154938/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzhhYWU2Ny1hNThiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogNt4sFlNkEZgSksf0-IBvUpFd8VuLbgEPCsM1SeEug=) | Hey team, on behalf of the Ohio Democratic Party, we just wanted to take a moment to say: _Thank you._

We've officially wrapped up 2022 and another election year where Ohioans proved that Democrats CAN win in Ohio. Thank you to the thousands of people who stepped up over the last year, volunteered, donated, and voted. We owe it all to this incredible team of grassroots supporters. We wouldn’t have made it this far without you.

And last week, we reached out before our crucial FEC end-of-year fundraising deadline– and you stepped up in a big way. Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-year fundraising goal and are starting off 2023 strong!

Team, you paved the way for Ohio Democrats to win key "toss-up" races. Together, we propelled Greg Landsman, Emilia Sykes, and Marcy Kaptur to victory, again beating the odds in some of Ohio's most hotly-contested congressional races.

Democrats faced an onslaught of corporate cash, illegal, GOP-gerrymandered maps, and widespread lies and misinformation by extreme Republicans in Ohio and D.C. **We're ready to keep fighting for the future of the Buckeye State, and we're glad to have you by our side.**

Thank you, and Happy New Year!

The Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56844073/386154939/150734317?refcode=em23_230103_eoyty_engg_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230103_eoyty_engg_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzhhYWU2Ny1hNThiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogNt4sFlNkEZgSksf0-IBvUpFd8VuLbgEPCsM1SeEug=)
