Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-year fundraising goal and are starting off 2023 strong! Team, you paved the way for Ohio Democrats to win key "toss-up" races. Together, we propelled Greg Landsman, Emilia Sykes, and Marcy Kaptur to victory, again beating the odds in some of Ohio's most hotly-contested congressional races. Democrats faced an onslaught of corporate cash, illegal, GOP-gerrymandered maps, and widespread lies and misinformation by extreme Republicans in Ohio and D.C. We're ready to keep fighting for the future of the Buckeye State, and we're glad to have you by our side. Thank you, and Happy New Year! The Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. | = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Kari Lake
subject: Do you think this will stop me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
I will keep fighting.
I will keep fighting.

| [ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zik271dqkplls0fl37po5b54e3s0tjgc7cc1vclg_)

---
Patriot,

If you think one setback will stop me from fighting for what’s right, you’re wrong.

My Election case provided the world with evidence that proves our elections are run outside of the law. This Judge did not rule in our favor. But for the sake of restoring faith and honesty in our elections, **I will appeal his ruling.**

We will take this fight all the way to the Supreme Court if that’s what is necessary. We will **NEVER** stop fighting until the concerns about our elections are dismissed.

We’re fighting an uphill battle; I won’t ignore that fact. **HOWEVER,** if we stand together, we can do anything we set our minds to.

No matter who stands against us — the Fake News media, the Establishment, the far-left cabal of anti-American Elites, or ANYONE that wants to silence our Conservative voices, we will keep fighting.

[**I need to know, Friend, do I have your support?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrde326q54vvj0ta2mogld7vsl0pkjh7782n9me0_)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zldu2fi6nb22qd2heamg4seq2dq3mdve7grikot8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziq0q7b41c8k0qekbiqbak9msoir6gq2njtqc6u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zheus19u50r70m86ehv6q1fk5iikhd1k1r2h3as0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6sthj3jt4v6bv5pnn9ok04mep5gr1i69q9gdo6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv5e59b5cnslcm2enep0ree29h1uhmsm93tg23og_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z262nmi8qidgi4vc5gv112e5cmfiheejj338k618_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8rm5td1cvl8b03c2efdnma8tpupk9hej8mu5ff8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrhhbh1b1ptok74esdodu6q49pfmtat7d2i4jfb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zskasv1gs9amh1o79eavnur709rcimpvr4t5sgig_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbk014lq4rorq63tm3c3a3npg38i5eam9rg6jje8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztb2ua6bgq3kb9ic5ac3q7rvso29ba40318jknv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgpjkecnrr14ig46tmppnefgpk3c76sv55cuade0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdkch5fh2mdbpummghlrss3q1vki3ftlulq3qqp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7h1m67n8ambifsi2bbs9qo72240uv9mu22vadug_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z710f7h092a2tavkdu8tpo1ph8nenv6mijfqoumo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5t9odo5lq61hpb77c9vqkg7vgm0ob0ucjurjpmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctjm9or4cth2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. | Fellow Patriot, **I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.** If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33ffec288a93451d9b8eab598ac9f2bd&_e=_0WQQ2siP_zNnrQPx3UNemQXORQ6szQyygvJmcs4kvBfVMbH2GMyWIyE0tsCVEbUhl4GcJvrUC4h6P7CypXyVRLbt-ux2j-gl_ff1s_qhyIw9h5r3L_4ULogeE1zyRgTpy5VZclUVzRxzeDkYioYVqKxBh0BNf_JCwdD2uy4k089OHO7bK2_iigDqFyq245Azl4yI2UyW-92gHzeqBWj8VPbofeqdI2_ikLG2HVVcdXp1-s3GoWbLe1ra3v_6PKKXppKwhyabznHQ4GiU8Yce-ZHaBkxp9vVbxmEYU3F3zSPIsJl31rPwHQtNUSC3dc6)** My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. **[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33ffec288a93451d9b8eab598ac9f2bd&_e=_0WQQ2siP_zNnrQPx3UNemQXORQ6szQyygvJmcs4kvBfVMbH2GMyWIyE0tsCVEbUhl4GcJvrUC4h6P7CypXyVRLbt-ux2j-gl_ff1s_qhyIw9h5r3L_4ULogeE1zyRgTpy5VZclUVzRxzeDkYioYVqKxBh0BNf_JCwdD2uy4k08_HhJ1mau5M0kMBb5h9ncVcwINh5ylirOOanEEP4yzTni7lMbTvIyLWbx0QssrGNq7js4o72OYdi8RiBldR1sYtm2dbe0yWX-aIRTSRuOFxTP4sm9kPS9TSH16icY5RkAg5-e2GWyT7ciVsOZXE9ZL)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33ffec288a93451d9b8eab598ac9f2bd&_e=_0WQQ2siP_zNnrQPx3UNemQXORQ6szQyygvJmcs4kvBfVMbH2GMyWIyE0tsCVEbUhl4GcJvrUC4h6P7CypXyVRLbt-ux2j-gl_ff1s_qhyIw9h5r3L_4ULogeE1zyRgTpy5VZclUVzRxzeDkYioYVqKxBh0BNf_JCwdD2uy4k09DqdDLVV4pIuV6E87FhHeAKjzN71g8hs4cfY9E_qvDsH-z7Eaj6Lyfts4jITUTbHOFmcgXSEG2Z-I64_td_inJ7UG_cwqL332ghyPfpRv8hfXRf_RrHSZlTiGk3U-nQPgKP5TuIDgL2DXerO24yYgG)

**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have hours before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33ffec288a93451d9b8eab598ac9f2bd&_e=_0WQQ2siP_zNnrQPx3UNemQXORQ6szQyygvJmcs4kvBfVMbH2GMyWIyE0tsCVEbUhl4GcJvrUC4h6P7CypXyVRLbt-ux2j-gl_ff1s_qhyIw9h5r3L_4ULogeE1zyRgTpy5VZclUVzRxzeDkYioYVqKxBh0BNf_JCwdD2uy4k0_qcE9jailtDuHG3unAIoIxDD4L2X79LV0ROILJBfiYf2xi-_EUOOar1XVOD9GLgQR5IvLaHwLg7t4alqI5HEa4fTzS3qn0UTGVb383usvMRRCGUTbmPuthd027Koe_j5Fq7wBAM-AT0AbhwOC0dbJH)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. subject: Nobody alive has ever seen what happened in the GOP House Caucus today. As suspected, Kevin McCarthy lacked the votes to become Speaker. (Three times. So far. Who knows how long this will go on.) But, for some reason, he chose to hold a vote anyhow as his party devolved into bedlam.

1st time in 100 years!
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf37177f-12c6-4965-b789-7990e92a06f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**_Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries will need our support to continue effectively fighting GOP seditionists, and supporting Democrats across the country in critical races. Will you join us to support his work with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for the battle?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T971c2f9d-448a-40cb-af82-4db5d1b7115b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Nobody alive has ever seen what happened in the GOP House Caucus today._ **_As suspected, Kevin McCarthy lacked the votes to become Speaker. (Three times. So far. Who knows how long this will go on.) But, for some reason, he chose to hold a vote anyhow as his party devolved into bedlam._ ** _Yes, for the first time in 100 years, a member of the majority standing for election to be Speaker of the House was rejected by their own party. Right after the vote, Marjorie Taylor Greene, who McCarthy bribed to vocally support him by promising to put her back on her committees--Jewish lasers be damned!--attacked her erstwhile pals on the radical right who voted against McCarthy, such as Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert. _ **_It truly is chaos for the House GOP. But, the Democrats?_**
---
|

| **_New Leader Rep. Hakeem Jeffries held the Democratic Caucus together, allowing us to attack the corrupt GOP clown-show today from a position of unity. He's showing Americans how an adult party looks, is putting Dems in position to reject GOP radicalism and even has a chance of making someone a speaker who supports abortion rights, Social Security, gun safety and other issues we care about._** [**_Jeffries will need our support to continue effectively fighting GOP seditionists. Will you join us to give new Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for the battle?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29db6dce-a1a9-47e6-9c15-994e541893ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for making this an even better day for Democrats and democracy, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6495e0c8-032d-4305-b348-c60e052d0b5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: How I'm going to make it happen | | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress. If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy... My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. | | | | Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress

body:
Despite the lasting impacts of that day, state legislators STILL have not been held accountable for their role in it. | | |
---
| | Friday marks the two-year anniversary of the deadly Capitol insurrection. Despite the lasting impacts of that day, insurrectionist state legislators STILL have not been held accountable for their role in it. **But under the 14th Amendment, they could be BANNED from office:**
* A ruling from the Fourth Circuit Court of Appeals recently held that the 14th Amendment might still be used to **disqualify insurrectionists and those who gave them “aid and comfort” from office.**
* In New Mexico, a state District Court Judge removed a county commissioner from office, **citing his role in the Capitol insurrection as a disqualification for public office.**
* A state Senator in Pennsylvania even introduced a measure to **disqualify individuals from running for office if they have “engaged in insurrection or rebellion”** against the United States.

[_**But we want to hear what your area Democrats think about efforts to ban insurrectionists from office:**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1Ta_IKZ9KKiml1HePtWn_CyMWUjo-gKGcOY8mKMonl8CUHM-nesJVBxitaqdZo6EJhaP9BH6Cv4fInM0b3VL_RTwms8tdZyE3_Ckb8X-sSaKOBEvcquQkz51NXkTvr5XJcx3esL22FgyG13rECIHpCSVgm14sodz3oGU54tIvVDKdFmSeZHk56LCl_S7-O6ljC0wIw3bUEV3Y-bdV9EOehArfwiwqjLO95lt_rIYR7PsI9zU5SfUhq3zxhfiRu6JQbxWPAhXfQA-pNJ_sVzKEDXVmC4CnknhdYUah-eJYtFkwvSulbURarqTLlpwoFJmpY7SMELRVCJDYViD4c5KDF1l9PnIA4rYHtH7OlHCn5ES4RKs_4e1faxKiWNandZEBAWxOVjub3MGaxR9MBYwmlACHgyJU1Szg6_f6jvjidW_kKQrm-FnDSYpZat8rB8P_JCjrUgXTDlJtT0J7tCvK4Me/3sj/zDXylsAuQumki5QaCpgAXQ/h0/_wbcQegU_gnFd4ScJLoIVvvNaraWTa7cJrQTbWVJUyE) | **Do you think insurrectionists should be banned from office?**

body:

---
We want your input to be front and center. We’re heading into 2023 with one of the strongest grassroots teams we’ve ever had. Grassroots supporters like you pitched in your time, energy, and effort to help Democrats retain our Senate majority, flip gubernatorial seats, and elect Democrats to state legislatures nationwide You’re such an invaluable member of our team, Derek, and we want to hear from you. **Will you take the DNC’s 2023 Priorities Survey to share what you and your family are fighting for in the new year? This survey should only take about two minutes of your time to complete -- and your feedback will be key in shaping the DNC’s work this year and beyond.**

We’re heading into 2023 with one of the strongest grassroots teams we’ve ever had. Grassroots supporters like you pitched in your time, energy, and effort to help Democrats retain our Senate majority, flip gubernatorial seats, and elect Democrats to state legislatures nationwide You’re such an invaluable member of our team, Derek, and we want to hear from you. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae9c09c60b4f456da049736b06dfbdcd&_e=4XK8Qy1yA1GVjvuoUN3v2cBAwmkbaVCK5RIKY2xRaf4x1NTqH18Y9tuRQaZ_CIb_mkiteDYn8LvrcP1oduRPJSvWNbQsefJpDGuQqVWsuv8UkXnIJlmxfvdPlvCRaKEiAKiTt1usx84Y4d6a_wVqsrxHUtTCO8OiBTXDywjX9cyxNRW_OGWHuhnE9_N4mjMM1zqvBOTqFOH5FcBKZ38l1E4LjJ_xV9QtdbDl4UUNPovaUXpMj0FgHrvd2LYwaKa58LUv5RYCtr6jfCizfQClibwB4TlofU3X6Qs3qBNF4kk%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae9c09c60b4f456da049736b06dfbdcd&_e=4XK8Qy1yA1GVjvuoUN3v2cBAwmkbaVCK5RIKY2xRaf4x1NTqH18Y9tuRQaZ_CIb_mkiteDYn8LvrcP1oduRPJSvWNbQsefJpDGuQqVWsuv8UkXnIJlmxfvdPlvCRaKEiAKiTt1usx84Y4d6a_wVqsh8dKZbR2r_1CKyeYsc2lT9pu4oeyD33AjNuwZvaHY9ngfnkVnUDwruPTv_W-f6nSXVNaDY9TzijjjdX3jbAFy9MC_UQv7QmMS3aDkG_57RM4mYmKAeHJ4rYp-EdiMKQ_CYagCNfLx44UOH98qRFZH4%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae9c09c60b4f456da049736b06dfbdcd&_e=4XK8Qy1yA1GVjvuoUN3v2cBAwmkbaVCK5RIKY2xRaf4x1NTqH18Y9tuRQaZ_CIb_mkiteDYn8LvrcP1oduRPJSvWNbQsefJpDGuQqVWsuv8UkXnIJlmxfvdPlvCRaKEiAKiTt1usx84Y4d6a_wVqshhfCBJW8X5LbG49dqQjZWZhKKUfdGysN5AegMBwt2sW36xCMUX0BUncqDGFryXmDgAWF8xn_rq1TPE_PyQi5Wp0RdDqC-eIOz-OzXJLEotetdlM69c5awPowWD5IDQqaUngVsdS8y7ukhT1tDrht-E%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae9c09c60b4f456da049736b06dfbdcd&_e=4XK8Qy1yA1GVjvuoUN3v2cBAwmkbaVCK5RIKY2xRaf4x1NTqH18Y9tuRQaZ_CIb_mkiteDYn8LvrcP1oduRPJSvWNbQsefJpDGuQqVWsuv8UkXnIJlmxfvdPlvCRaKEit7CRU8F8Vp7ZDe57QC2pS5DRZZrkMeswuDwj0QOYQC9TlABy0D4xYbysRTrksXphwDB9rElKICsGhUIz5OCKktwnIGwGDoICCtQ3sD-kk8_EsVHFWStG5IRZShD3dZKzaPAWXVOCZY8Jl8RL3D6kc3qoxckLqvy0FiIAfrHy6Y4%3D)

[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae9c09c60b4f456da049736b06dfbdcd&_e=4XK8Qy1yA1GVjvuoUN3v2cBAwmkbaVCK5RIKY2xRaf4x1NTqH18Y9tuRQaZ_CIb_mkiteDYn8LvrcP1oduRPJSvWNbQsefJpDGuQqVWsuv8UkXnIJlmxfvdPlvCRaKEiAKiTt1usx84Y4d6a_wVqsq_cCYyKQk4J05GE0oMYkd68P59DkQZwNmVRRI1AW-_Pi481BisHOzV-WOoQnfQuvP8atO8myad3NF-R7ogRIJnxQK72-re7Bs-I-QZtMTd2Dp5_5iZUYiCA2KzOi0uTfQTmmZfA5ECmUFhoqLyJkrg%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2464f8119655b234/0feb268eed00dd3dc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — Happy New Year! **

---
2022 was a tough year in some respects. Democrats kept control of the Senate and Congress ended the year by voting for a ridiculous $1.7 TRILLION spending bill — which I voted against. Entering 2023, it’s critical that we don’t lose hope and that patriots like you stay engaged. That’s the _only_ way we will stop the woke left agenda in 2023, and win back the Senate and White House in 2024. [**I’m reaching out today about our first Conservative Priorities Survey of 2023. My team just finalized it, and I’m hoping you will be one of the first to take it. **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2464f8119655b234/d39db6c6f6de42a1c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
[**TAKE THE SURVEY »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2464f8119655b234/7f108fee0f64651fc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
These surveys matter because they let me know what issues you’re focused on — whether it’s stopping more wasteful spending, securing the border, or getting propaganda out of schools. **I’ll be reviewing the responses in the next day or so, and I hope to see your thoughts when I do.** Thank you for your continued support.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2464f8119655b234/2dec9254f4d93b2cc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Senator Roger Marshall
---
[**TAKE THE SURVEY »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2464f8119655b234/6a1c59578aa83829c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

| | |

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2464f8119655b234/b51fc01de3feb8bcc3d6b838967d376c/37973)

subject: Can you take 2 minutes for our official survey to start the year?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
As the new Congress begins its work and elected officials ask about our supporters’ priorities, we’re asking:
#
Derek -
Today, a new Congress will be sworn in.
And as you see it on the news, please know that Democrats held the Senate and exceeded expectations in the House because of the work we did. We spent more than $24 million on some of the most effective ads of the cycle.
So as the new Congress begins its work and elected officials ask about our supporters’ priorities, we’re asking:
**[Can you please take two minutes to complete VoteVets’ Official Issues Survey today? Your response is very, very important to our work.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230103_vv_issue_survey/?source=em230103-1-30&refcode2=7259.3013755.g31lZa&akid=7259%2E3013755%2Eg31lZa)
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230103_vv_issue_survey/?source=em230103-1-30&refcode2=7259.3013755.g31lZa&akid=7259%2E3013755%2Eg31lZa)
---
VoteVets is the largest progressive organization of Veterans, Military family members, and those who support them in the country.
We are responsible for lifting up the voices of those we represent and making sure the problems they face are being addressed in Washington.
That’s why it is so important that we check in with our members to make sure we are on the same page about what needs to get done and what your priorities are.
**[So please, take 2 minutes to complete our survey.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230103_vv_issue_survey/?source=em230103-1-30&refcode2=7259.3013755.g31lZa&akid=7259%2E3013755%2Eg31lZa)

---
Your response will make VoteVets a stronger, more informed organization.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z59ou96vl69v3158hesoh2ki1t41tqngmi6ltp58_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9np5ipbl74e4jt2h4nl7ecuprvj9uqiibeng95g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgj0p8hvvq6rvp889pdfi9pfj2l9clcfnajd4rvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfsg0c22pg0gtilbjm3nvc5eqbkr21tl3a474qpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zevmnt73lca76aqiif3plsrio1r4kqp57dc4gqr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfj68dupmpgjf79eqtaefj0rk7r7eh5o44v98v4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhfgdhb1a3m4t7rqkfnjm6ko64d9b1m5j1tmev38_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z42e72t6ad3r592ohcr4nsa6a7gl836204ctna28_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb550395qc0doj0mvgph2dmha8f3ag246qgfs4go_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z896bgc0sna5pdntne580ravpuf15pakafb80i6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc1sb1hi8lmi53smcssnqnm8d5dar1p3muiotp6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1770s3c97ncsm9vv9tv9humkaalcqoj2tjsqojg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0v1n7okdrjsvdouam2sibdvdl7h863prhlfqo2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2v61rlrsdguf7rq18ac4eso400aq9l9uhvc1j28_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6boid6haebnqj28ftvlq7liq8bmn3jfj3gm5et0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3o9h0hcju51gfhuc6qquc4an5mj7p4vm943uh2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4j3hpar275qpeta268hljgorg6h7r0fh664l550_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zthbr6t45fea8nrv13ocrrd71b0c028r76ei4k8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhchnb9gp3uhdjpfelm6ahosqmp5rf9edqrmgnho_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z14mmsf5pg6qhocb2b05eon3l7cpgm9ln79bmvkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsfu6aqt74pup7gmifa9tjdg1dsq4g68pshfrt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2ctge8ob4c9h2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: Tune in to the official swearing-in of the 118th Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=ebe1a0b044&e=292fde286a)
---
| Peter,

Today is the day that the 118th Congress will be officially sworn into office. With my first Congressional term starting today, I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for supporting me and believing in our campaign. I will be forever grateful to you and every one of our grassroots supporters who made this victory possible. I could not be here without you.

As I take my oath later this morning, I want to ensure that everyone who has supported our campaign is able to participate in this historic moment. Please join [HERE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=5764b9bbda&e=292fde286a) to watch as I take the oath of office and we open the 118th Congress today, January 3rd, 2023 at 12 PM Eastern Time (9 AM Pacific Time). I am eternally grateful to you.

I look forward to working with you to ensure that our community and our country remain a welcoming, safe, and prosperous place for all of us.

All the best,
Kevin Mullin
Congressmember-elect, CA15

| Team,

If you missed it over the holidays, far-right Arizona Congressman Andy Biggs announced he’s running for Speaker of the U.S. House as Congress reconvenes.

Whether Biggs is successful in becoming speaker, or just denying the gavel to Kevin McCarthy, it shows MAGA extremists in Congress want more power now that Republicans hold a slim majority.

We knew control of Congress could come down to Arizona, which means if we’re going to win it back, we need to start holding the far-right extremists in the AZ GOP’s congressional delegation accountable.

**[Team, with a narrow majority, winning more seats here in Arizona will be the difference between who holds the House in 2024. We have to start letting voters know right now just how extreme Biggs, Paul Gosar, Eli Crane and the rest of the AZ GOP delegation is. Will you donate $5 right now to help us do just that?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ypfG2RtToSFH2mmhfWlkDwhBs-tggzzoEusy1naojUmEstnRMk8EEV7FrNwaamcZCBWIFGp4T3svPutuCP-wOb17V7KO8m0h26j91_TNAaQCXE5MpFCm0RChOVuTTI5Jfsa5buvrW445auHZDrGofX4-LAqBZItiRzTUB8Vn7i2Bh2KQbSA1qslj0iYK33yJMc8_-wxVF3s0qqAAVA7pXMdA_ZIpcbSN5pXamBLXwkPPNQUK6VZUPOloqLAbJwhLMVJJCZIcbL4w0jXmZE05BNWnYH-eYf4tM7MBIJVc_1RXmJey7dTQGbIPYFLO78hvmq8Fs8mDlNkIBby8YAZj7mva4qgbU1RlwcZn_wLnQbZ6SzVACIPZ3Lgrlr29p2zs8N8jPl8qKNFEeLHwA_Zw-7JJxJ3euO0WAZOLsCZ2AgQ6vgohGEuYNnlxi2sbw1fKw/3sj/CdmplCBnSGGLzFoCfO5dvw/h1/abW35JJOzw1kas1lQnNp0CovwngdP1dAfqtojO8URME)** [

It’s clear by Biggs’ candidacy for speaker that the far right is going to be calling the shots in the House during the current cycle.

That means people like Biggs, Gosar, Marjorie Taylor Greene and Jim Jordan will be in control of what bills pass, and what committees focus on. **It also means the House won’t focus for one second on what Arizonans and Americans actually need.**

clean_body: | | | We need to hold them accountable | | | Team, If you missed it over the holidays, far-right Arizona Congressman Andy Biggs announced he’s running for Speaker of the U.S. House as Congress reconvenes. Whether Biggs is successful in becoming speaker, or just denying the gavel to Kevin McCarthy, it shows MAGA extremists in Congress want more power now that Republicans hold a slim majority. We knew control of Congress could come down to Arizona, which means if we’re going to win it back, we need to start holding the far-right extremists in the AZ GOP’s congressional delegation accountable. It’s clear by Biggs’ candidacy for speaker that the far right is going to be calling the shots in the House during the current cycle. That means people like Biggs, Gosar, Marjorie Taylor Greene and Jim Jordan will be in control of what bills pass, and what committees focus on. It also means the House won’t focus for one second on what Arizonans and Americans actually need. We have to hold them accountable from today all the way to November 2024. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let’s continue flipping more seats blue, Arizona Democrats Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . Peter, this issue is incredibly personal to me. Every day four Virginians die as a result of drug overdose, _and the_ _[**_most dangerous_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c72556cd09944070b6eda91dc6d616c5&_e=e6yZLaIiPhln9Ex_XIgQ_XhTBLC8etKoV4lS_cwoekUMbngsuhHrmUFiNs4HC8kuTEQaR1ZtqlM2cdVy5VGZ5LHXjfVEQBHSjCg-UpZYRdzv2_wgJKXa3cGM8Km7nQRjdAagg6DFimqVV6vSD5jWld1hfx9tPD98bibmANVVKxQ6Je1bz2zyRSWfOd7mhi8vYvnH2lvKTj56cd8xkGKQTGKJmyH0DK3qVEsY0DlkQ8gku2jBXrLfqu2e5fTXaZJSOv72OUd9sazucLdb9l14sQTTFXxpmhqwiWfxPx-juRWtzxV808uDDfgGy7HMZWhYc79mJxgwjzsuOtg1_ug13zxvEQA_KOsVJ0ZiCEXqO6IVvrKPclXyiisVvRvwuE2_8aBm2A7x4dNy2g4F5xU4EA%3D%3D)_ _type of overdose is from counterfeit drugs laced with fentanyl. _ **We’re dealing with a nationwide fentanyl crisis because the Chinese Communist Party continually smuggles this deadly drug into our country – and there’s NO end in sight.**
---
[**END THE FENTANYL CRISIS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c72556cd09944070b6eda91dc6d616c5&_e=e6yZLaIiPhln9Ex_XIgQ_XhTBLC8etKoV4lS_cwoekUMbngsuhHrmUFiNs4HC8kuTEQaR1ZtqlM2cdVy5VGZ5LHXjfVEQBHSjCg-UpZYRdzv2_wgJKXa3cGM8Km7nQRjdAagg6DFimqVV6vSD5jWld1hfx9tPD98bibmANVVKxQ6Je1bz2zyRSWfOd7mhi8vYvnH2lvKTj56cd8xkGKQTGKJmyH0DK3qVEsY0DlkQ8iQ47AX-93FCTEeoPeC0jGll0iru9TRopq3Oh9PKDHxioSHbqp5A3JIqv22_ZBifhLHvuX1IX08hKJLEdTwX01EFj6quPwYyfVZLs5nllyUskROPFKEaMBMha1YJIscHkagvjtjSuYolYkWxXcXpZVg3nf4PvFQVuEbbt5_ow1L_w%3D%3D)

We elected Wiley to Congress, sending a representative who truly knows the values of our district to DC to fight for us. While it feels like we just had an election, we have to move forward and get 2023 off to a great start.
Can you help us kick off the new year with a $23 donation right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230102-email&amount=23]
This year is sure to be an exciting one. Wiley has already gotten to work in Washington, and we are excited to see all of the change he’ll bring to our district. What we need to do now is put in the work to keep the momentum from the last year going.
It’s a new beginning, but we have the same goal: keep Wiley in Congress fighting for the people of NC-13. And we’ll need all of our supporters to continue stepping up to help us get there.

body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4449c33c65ab49808a84da0a64fd1028&_e=9kyzpgPYxyS04hAjflNrEHxkJV4T4hMqOagPmguJVbhLzNd6bqoq50x7sjIoqo31Ko1EhO9ZMwmB-N7NmYbCYydEa2uYgfQI_J-lts15QeiQKt0RLJIbyEEyo1vt5MW8hp64noIQ_fBlIrfMEvSG9H_u5oJF0fpZJIdmxKZxfChFVoJAtiww-_VB5uv3cUd0c96TNTbaA-35qSfCh5YEGj5RQ04eLjW5bn8xngqWeeRpWYkm4BD0lRjfuyLFQpaIn8XlxhQ2FbCjaG9gOQKZy_dFIjKdPvhtvKh3YvfIk9s-dM-GXmoTBbdGILb7O3dNtKtjZYEqmZszeCYUMB3aLhi4UOy9XfJMkGvGVqMRurgCVLLDzdJQBdyM3L8tyGbUB97pg2tEpd50D-x7J73b-A%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4449c33c65ab49808a84da0a64fd1028&_e=9kyzpgPYxyS04hAjflNrEHxkJV4T4hMqOagPmguJVbhLzNd6bqoq50x7sjIoqo31Ko1EhO9ZMwmB-N7NmYbCYydEa2uYgfQI_J-lts15QeiQKt0RLJIbyEEyo1vt5MW8hp64noIQ_fBlIrfMEvSG9H_u5oJF0fpZJIdmxKZxfChFVoJAtiww-_VB5uv3cUd0c96TNTbaA-35qSfCh5YEGj5RQ04eLjW5bn8xngqWeeRpWYkm4BD0lRjfuyLFQpaIv4XwPJqnQ02m6LxpPw6r4NKMK2sWMJEOI4WW5xfi6lWguxcrDIwBXWj4NRcwZv1c7DqdbmTpflAJquDLqeagwXBnyitjLAOLG91wWJuL3hQ1qarRc4ZneW84WnLFmqOTRxcFH6dawi-gi-jQnmf9Xg%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4449c33c65ab49808a84da0a64fd1028&_e=9kyzpgPYxyS04hAjflNrEHxkJV4T4hMqOagPmguJVbhLzNd6bqoq50x7sjIoqo31Ko1EhO9ZMwmB-N7NmYbCYydEa2uYgfQI_J-lts15QeiQKt0RLJIbyEEyo1vt5MW8hp64noIQ_fBlIrfMEvSG9H_u5oJF0fpZJIdmxKZxfChFVoJAtiww-_VB5uv3cUd0c96TNTbaA-35qSfCh5YEGj5RQ04eLjW5bn8xngqWeeRpWYkm4BD0lRjfuyLFQpaIGrC_flrkHFW7zbGoQMdS7md22umWGOBinSOa4XvWkrKP4VBEuzfRVIpVwUPH521MVme4w5izbBWF-oT7QGl7db8OJW-Q_eohiQlhIsNzLoeryWCM5sOyfwobw_UwYxXe5HJ_e2YAs4YWL10g_VcMhA%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=232b3e7f48ce42418fe49c4d07bacec6&_e=XqYaP_3ntjEC_MsXS6vyMgt_W-WzJF-EO6nasVsBP4gtNvTSg0sQYzaEkW_I7ReVE8SJT7tZeetUImMM8EdNGkGvJ5MMvA_ODMGY2gQWCORlOQWvJ7DDBCeFFLK9snwzsb5_zwmf0wjDgex7StUf0t5_wSKOEYRauHXNvGYYxkmxC4T8v_nZM12IRLjHZ1dcEf-p0cGIA7les6SF88h2ZtMqnBQnRbJhnQrNMy5ipKBO3t4T8LsIzAEBfKo6Cvy_s3gubN_hQeMGhm593ZIIKvVNgWEidJ6e3xfbkT1nLaM%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=232b3e7f48ce42418fe49c4d07bacec6&_e=XqYaP_3ntjEC_MsXS6vyMgt_W-WzJF-EO6nasVsBP4gtNvTSg0sQYzaEkW_I7ReVE8SJT7tZeetUImMM8EdNGkGvJ5MMvA_ODMGY2gQWCORlOQWvJ7DDBCeFFLK9snwzsb5_zwmf0wjDgex7StUf0n2yIaide5s9JldaHlWbPkLrS52ANLl0dQN3mDWs7Xym3bneZYKVQsFkWiC2eEqGHOuxbGhWR7VuFv1ghUN7AxRsVcqOGwqaUmh98CpZAx-HtnWHqWajGMASuxsOJzHWhll2IGhlFuPgdhQ7lNM-_nA%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: BREAKING: I stood strong against Kevin McCarthy
body:
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oCRjE21G3r0NXIjWccIR3n2yZEO0T2ADkDQHbnwIa3RamTasoLQH21GNrjJu0f4KY1ocC6KaHdHocnkdPBTkequFG7S6rCzqR8ovLMfkQQzVdL0jfSEm_qdb1BVkF4CfHzG71ABc1giY1g9prsYr59sJnvFPpOEobezBbGRPUJ1Hv9qHZ7_r_Uh2juVmUtRXQWEE2J_6DcQ=&c=NbN0LELo0m7MliasOnz_qrbxx0NXU-GdExku7wq4GfkxOCiwu90lbQ==&ch=j189ThbZTu9klplrDRVJQOzi6mLhUwSm3o3YgbdWT1bWkJCur5dd8Q==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Maybe the right person for the job of Speaker of the House isn't someone who has sold shares of himself for more than a decade to get it...
I HAVE NO REGRETS ABOUT CASTING MY VOTE ON THE HOUSE FLOOR TODAY AGAINST KEVIN McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!
---
| | [JOIN ME: DON'T CAVE TO CAVIN' McCARTHY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oCRjE21G3r0NXIjWccIR3n2yZEO0T2ADkDQHbnwIa3RamTasoLQH21GNrjJu0f4KY1ocC6KaHdHocnkdPBTkequFG7S6rCzqR8ovLMfkQQzVdL0jfSEm_qdb1BVkF4CfHzG71ABc1giY1g9prsYr59sJnvFPpOEobezBbGRPUJ1Hv9qHZ7_r_Uh2juVmUtRXQWEE2J_6DcQ=&c=NbN0LELo0m7MliasOnz_qrbxx0NXU-GdExku7wq4GfkxOCiwu90lbQ==&ch=j189ThbZTu9klplrDRVJQOzi6mLhUwSm3o3YgbdWT1bWkJCur5dd8Q==)
---
| That's right - as a proud Florida Man, I know what I speak on this:
If you want to Drain the Swamp, you CANNOT put the biggest alligator in charge of the exercise!
But that's exactly what we would get with a McCarthy Speakership...
We're talking about someone who the corrupt D.C. special interests can always count on to be their lapdog.
Someone whose donors pushed vaccine mandates on my constituents and on every American citizen across the country.
Someone who worked AGAINST electing America First Republicans across the country last year.
Someone who's so close with the lobbyists that he rooms with them...
And I will not sit by as the preferred 'Republican' of Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Wall Street - the man who believes in NOTHING - receives his undeserved coronation.
This town is broken, Peter. [We won't fix it unless we demand change.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oCRjE21G3r0NXIjWccIR3n2yZEO0T2ADkDQHbnwIa3RamTasoLQH21GNrjJu0f4KY1ocC6KaHdHocnkdPBTkequFG7S6rCzqR8ovLMfkQQzVdL0jfSEm_qdb1BVkF4CfHzG71ABc1giY1g9prsYr59sJnvFPpOEobezBbGRPUJ1Hv9qHZ7_r_Uh2juVmUtRXQWEE2J_6DcQ=&c=NbN0LELo0m7MliasOnz_qrbxx0NXU-GdExku7wq4GfkxOCiwu90lbQ==&ch=j189ThbZTu9klplrDRVJQOzi6mLhUwSm3o3YgbdWT1bWkJCur5dd8Q==) And that's why I'm standing in the breach RESISTING the Swamp's attempts to rush through a spineless RINO that will end up betraying Republicans and caving to liberals!
I need to know if you'll stand with me on this. Consider this your opportunity to show how the MAGA Base feels about a Cavin' McCarthy Speakership. If you're a "NO" Vote like I am... Please make that 📣 LOUD AND CLEAR 📣 by clicking the button below!
---
| | [SAY NO TO McCARTHY FOR SPEAKER!!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oCRjE21G3r0NXIjWccIR3n2yZEO0T2ADkDQHbnwIa3RamTasoLQH21GNrjJu0f4KY1ocC6KaHdHocnkdPBTkequFG7S6rCzqR8ovLMfkQQzVdL0jfSEm_qdb1BVkF4CfHzG71ABc1giY1g9prsYr59sJnvFPpOEobezBbGRPUJ1Hv9qHZ7_r_Uh2juVmUtRXQWEE2J_6DcQ=&c=NbN0LELo0m7MliasOnz_qrbxx0NXU-GdExku7wq4GfkxOCiwu90lbQ==&ch=j189ThbZTu9klplrDRVJQOzi6mLhUwSm3o3YgbdWT1bWkJCur5dd8Q==)
---
| Peter, here's why it's so important that I get your backing on this...
The Establishment "Only Kevin" crowd is so desperate to maintain the status quo in Washington that they seriously threatened to REMOVE REPUBLICANS FROM COMMITTEES if we vote against Kiev Kevin!!!
We triggered the Swamp, and they're coming back with the vengeance.
In order to hold them off (and to prevent them from going from one California Liberal Speaker to another), [will you stand strong right now at this historic moment for our party? ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oCRjE21G3r0NXIjWccIR3n2yZEO0T2ADkDQHbnwIa3RamTasoLQH21GNrjJu0f4KY1ocC6KaHdHocnkdPBTkequFG7S6rCzqR8ovLMfkQQzVdL0jfSEm_qdb1BVkF4CfHzG71ABc1giY1g9prsYr59sJnvFPpOEobezBbGRPUJ1Hv9qHZ7_r_Uh2juVmUtRXQWEE2J_6DcQ=&c=NbN0LELo0m7MliasOnz_qrbxx0NXU-GdExku7wq4GfkxOCiwu90lbQ==&ch=j189ThbZTu9klplrDRVJQOzi6mLhUwSm3o3YgbdWT1bWkJCur5dd8Q==)
This is a fight worth having, Peter.
I'd be honored to take it on alongside patriots like you.
---
| | [DEMAND. BETTER. LEADERSHIP.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oCRjE21G3r0NXIjWccIR3n2yZEO0T2ADkDQHbnwIa3RamTasoLQH21GNrjJu0f4KY1ocC6KaHdHocnkdPBTkequFG7S6rCzqR8ovLMfkQQzVdL0jfSEm_qdb1BVkF4CfHzG71ABc1giY1g9prsYr59sJnvFPpOEobezBbGRPUJ1Hv9qHZ7_r_Uh2juVmUtRXQWEE2J_6DcQ=&c=NbN0LELo0m7MliasOnz_qrbxx0NXU-GdExku7wq4GfkxOCiwu90lbQ==&ch=j189ThbZTu9klplrDRVJQOzi6mLhUwSm3o3YgbdWT1bWkJCur5dd8Q==)
---
|
Thanks for fighting with me,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oCRjE21G3r0NXIjWccIR3n2yZEO0T2ADkDQHbnwIa3RamTasoLQH21GNrjJu0f4KY1ocC6KaHdHocnkdPBTkequFG7S6rCzqR8ovLMfkQQzVdL0jfSEm_qdb1BVkF4CfHzG71ABc1giY1g9prsYr59sJnvFPpOEobezBbGRPUJ1Hv9qHZ7_r_Uh2juVmUtRXQWEE2J_6DcQ=&c=NbN0LELo0m7MliasOnz_qrbxx0NXU-GdExku7wq4GfkxOCiwu90lbQ==&ch=j189ThbZTu9klplrDRVJQOzi6mLhUwSm3o3YgbdWT1bWkJCur5dd8Q==)
---
| Matt Gaetz Republican, Florida's 1st District

Kari Lake here with a critical update:

My Election Case provided the world with evidence that proves our elections are run outside of the law. Sadly, this Judge did not rule in our favor. However, for the sake of restoring faith and honesty in our elections, I will appeal his ruling.

We will take this fight all the way to the Supreme Court if that's what is necessary.**[ I will never stop fighting for you, but I need your support. Can you chip in just $25 or $50? Your donation today will help me fight for free and fair elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62153895:6LWbRwG5N:m:1:3331421248:40E1EC042A236FB5A939F2BDCD66ACE5:r)**

Thank you for standing up for what is right.

Kari

name: PA Democrats
subject: Send Senator Fetterman your well wishes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Dear Peter, today, with the swearing in of newly elected members, the 118th Congress begins. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, Today, with the swearing in of newly elected members, the 118th Congress begins. As John Fetterman is sworn in and joins the Senate alongside Senator Bob Casey, it will mark the first time since 2010 that we’ve had _two_ Democrats representing us in the Senate. Talk about a big day for Pennsylvania! John’s election to the US Senate was the only Senate seat flipped in the country, giving Democrats a 51-50 majority. In the U.S. House, Representative Summer Lee will become Pennsylvania’s first-ever Black congresswoman! We also want to congratulate Representative Chris Deluzio on being sworn in for his first term. Additionally, we’re thankful for the continued service of our seven incumbent Democratic representatives as they serve the people of Pennsylvania for another term. **Looking forward, we**** _can’t wait_****to see what our Democratic delegation in Congress accomplishes for the people of Pennsylvania.**
---
