clean_body: Dear Peter, today, with the swearing in of newly elected members, the 118th Congress begins. | | | | | Dear Peter, Today, with the swearing in of newly elected members, the 118th Congress begins. As John Fetterman is sworn in and joins the Senate alongside Senator Bob Casey, it will mark the first time since 2010 that we’ve had two Democrats representing us in the Senate. Talk about a big day for Pennsylvania! John’s election to the US Senate was the only Senate seat flipped in the country, giving Democrats a 51-50 majority. In the U.S. House, Representative Summer Lee will become Pennsylvania’s first-ever Black congresswoman! We also want to congratulate Representative Chris Deluzio on being sworn in for his first term. Additionally, we’re thankful for the continued service of our seven incumbent Democratic representatives as they serve the people of Pennsylvania for another term. Looking forward, we can’t waitto see what our Democratic delegation in Congress accomplishes for the people of Pennsylvania. On this auspicious day, Senator Fetterman, congratulating him on his special day! To ensure that we elect more Democrats to the Pennsylvania General Assembly and Supreme Court later this year,= Thank you, Pennsylvania Democrats | | Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. I need your most recent opinion on this since things have changed DRAMATICALLY over the past year.

Just hours ago, extreme MAGA Republicans failed to vote for a speaker of the House for the first time in decades.
Let me repeat that: Kevin McCarthy’s own Republicans just rejected him – proving that House Republicans are fighting themselves instead of fighting for the people.

name: Katie Porter
subject: A new session of Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
While this is my third time being sworn in, each time I’m reminded of what my former professor Elizabeth Warren taught me, nobody gets elected alone.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15609%2E3422442%2EOxzaBu)
Derek, today I’m being sworn in to the 118th Congress! While this is my third time being sworn in, each time I’m reminded of what my former professor Elizabeth Warren taught me: **_nobody gets elected alone._**
I always think about everyone who made this possible—from volunteers to donors to voters. Sending a Democrat from purple Orange County to Congress (who also happens to be a minivan-driving single mom!) was something many people deemed impossible just four years ago.
This will be my first term being in the minority party. That means Republicans have control over what bills we vote on and much of our committees’ agenda. **But I'm going to continue my work holding big corporations accountable for cheating consumers, boosting transparency in government, and lowering costs for families.** My job is to use whatever mechanisms I have to deliver for California families.
All my thanks from Washington,
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14212?refcode=EMAF03_INA_20230103_V1_F&t=2&akid=15609%2E3422442%2EOxzaBu)**

subject: What issues are on your mind for 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www

Peter, We’re firm believers that political conversation needs to be a two-way street. [**That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to take our petition about the issues that are top of mind for you as we head into 2023. What issues do you want your representatives focused on as we head into the new year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56831716/386142066/931241712?refcode=230103-PET&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDIzMmY0NS05ODhiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ib7dJ5AQuYGGx8t6ypCTJOEZiF_QcEfUdIuNHy8l4VU=&emci=735761ea-d882-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=7d232f45-988b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) In 2022, Indiana Democrats delivered economic opportunity in all 92 counties and historic investments to fix our nation’s crumbling infrastructure and the rising cost of goods. subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b26d21014e147a6b922604d7d7712bf&_e=wvYPqA1cwR9bnCMWYZfyQnDb9PsElPWA2jF7U5lcj7Ht0DFo1G0JW6cNogOfOs55huqRINeCW2NoLt4JCOZHr-QGEkbbVG-7l3Nrxtk-t8TaBjK9DvuSYQN4a9BIXxixwkfazEoZIW3IaVlhZs1qNaWTDBsBJeXj041VFweIVl9HOt8piCL53_uJOBPSjD64miO3a3_xUt5n1uE1gIzI_LtDrN9NW3YoYYdU8ocdQjloBr86jQHxOL4GG_xWC8lc3ocJkHoHnPXgqV2PAdcI3NqWABr35hBMll2EUHD6DdP_eYfplGn3dpOqMuhQ-0ueq44Hs0TwOJSpI-g6MtS2HAKSkJOZ1E5BjCv--4Z3BGsZ7v56TFYEtGTv-2b4EMj6rT_wXOZBoNtdsJRtorb_Pg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b26d21014e147a6b922604d7d7712bf&_e=wvYPqA1cwR9bnCMWYZfyQnDb9PsElPWA2jF7U5lcj7Ht0DFo1G0JW6cNogOfOs55huqRINeCW2NoLt4JCOZHr-QGEkbbVG-7l3Nrxtk-t8TaBjK9DvuSYQN4a9BIXxixwkfazEoZIW3IaVlhZs1qNaWTDBsBJeXj041VFweIVl9HOt8piCL53_uJOBPSjD64miO3a3_xUt5n1uE1gIzI_LtDrN9NW3YoYYdU8ocdQjloBr86jQHxOL4GG_xWC8lcyMVefCnBVa6aIjCPZBF2Niq473i_DCmwPyEqTXdAH2N3U52SdkzdkFk-K2IrzTngkYwmi3-87U5LcOAKHj895jcVk7q4obXbC8mEoM577YDuTXOiZVoJpa9L7r0EpziM5yscPcH7Cd9-6osJU9dtfA%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b26d21014e147a6b922604d7d7712bf&_e=wvYPqA1cwR9bnCMWYZfyQnDb9PsElPWA2jF7U5lcj7Ht0DFo1G0JW6cNogOfOs55huqRINeCW2NoLt4JCOZHr-QGEkbbVG-7l3Nrxtk-t8TaBjK9DvuSYQN4a9BIXxixwkfazEoZIW3IaVlhZs1qNaWTDBsBJeXj041VFweIVl9HOt8piCL53_uJOBPSjD64miO3a3_xUt5n1uE1gIzI_LtDrN9NW3YoYYdU8ocdQjloBr86jQHxOL4GG_xWC8lchA42HI_WMdcKN1pKZIn1aJKugCp49LcBaU75qk7iW-ff9t24M7CtQAl55mdvn2QkVK_1RW0sxE_PS3EeIcl9wKim6j746hxKpoQLz1TUsZOjEjJg3QYuijT_C3_IkAXibai-RsAE6MF-T0cI7ZaN9A%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Breaking News via Shontel Brown for Congress
subject: McCarthy fails the vote for House speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
The vote for House speaker went into multiple rounds for the first time in decades.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56853604/386171083/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230103GOPLeadership_RepMaj_SB4C_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGMxMzFmMS1jMjhiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnyA__uL3s92ftUT522OpAk0Xb3tZ6nXUC8qge4Nj8c=) Peter, here’s a quick rundown of what’s happening on Capitol Hill:

– House Democrats remained united behind our leader, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, while GOP Rep. Kevin McCarthy failed to garner support for House speaker three times and counting. **_For the first time in decades, the vote for House speaker has gone into multiple rounds._**
– GOP members holding out against McCarthy are asking for guarantees on extreme legislation. A leader of these holdouts, Rep. Matt Gaetz, said he’d rather have a Democratic speaker than let McCarthy win without getting his demands.
– Just hours into the 118th Congress, the GOP has already shown __its inability to lead and the willingness of its members to halt our work in the House__ for extreme demands at the expense of the American people.

While the GOP is busy squabbling to agree on a leader, House Democrats remain united and ready to continue making progress. No matter who the GOP puts in charge, we’re ready to ensure Democrats stay committed to the important work of implementing critical legislation from 2022.

[**_As we kick off the 118th Congress, will you help show Shontel Brown and her Democratic colleagues in the House that you have their back by chipping in $5 today? Your support now will help solidify our ability to lead, despite the GOP’s setbacks._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56853605/386171105/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230103GOPLeadership_RepMaj_SB4C_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGMxMzFmMS1jMjhiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnyA__uL3s92ftUT522OpAk0Xb3tZ6nXUC8qge4Nj8c=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56853606/386171116/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230103GOPLeadership_RepMaj_SB4C_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGMxMzFmMS1jMjhiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnyA__uL3s92ftUT522OpAk0Xb3tZ6nXUC8qge4Nj8c=)**

clean_body: The vote for House speaker went into multiple rounds for the first time in decades. = Peter, here’s a quick rundown of what’s happening on Capitol Hill: – House Democrats remained united behind our leader, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, while GOP Rep. Kevin McCarthy failed to garner support for House speaker three times and counting. For the first time in decades, the vote for House speaker has gone into multiple rounds. – GOP members holding out against McCarthy are asking for guarantees on extreme legislation. A leader of these holdouts, Rep. Matt Gaetz, said he’d rather have a Democratic speaker than let McCarthy win without getting his demands. – Just hours into the 118th Congress, the GOP has already shown its inability to lead and the willingness of its members to halt our work in the House for extreme demands at the expense of the American people. While the GOP is busy squabbling to agree on a leader, House Democrats remain united and ready to continue making progress. No matter who the GOP puts in charge, we’re ready to ensure Democrats stay committed to the important work of implementing critical legislation from 2022. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Onward, Shontel Brown for Congress As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. name: Wade Herring
subject: Best wishes in 2023!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://www.wadeherringforcongress.com/ [https://www.wadeherringforcongress.com/]
Best wishes for a prosperous and healthy 2023!
Peter,
One final report on my congressional campaign. I am so grateful for all of your support of all kinds.
Running a political campaign is like starting a business. More than ever, I think small business owners are some of the bravest people I know.
I campaigned in all 15 counties of the District, which includes Georgia’s entire coast. I put over 25,000 miles on the campaign vehicle in 10 months’ time.
My campaign raised approximately 1.4 million dollars, almost 5 times more than any other Democratic congressional candidate has ever raised in the First District. The only Georgia congressional challenger to raise more was Marcus Flowers. His 15 million dollars could not beat Marjorie Taylor Greene, and he only received 34% of the vote. Seven congressional challengers in Georgia did not top $100,000.
I earned the endorsements of the AFL-CIO, Vote Pro Choice, the National Association of Social Workers, Newtown Action Alliance, Friends of the Earth, Moms Demand Action, and Progressive Turnout Project. I had the backing of the AME Church. I campaigned with Senators Warnock and Ossoff, Stacey Abrams, and numerous, local elected officials.
The campaign’s TikTok videos went viral (I am the chillest dude in America), so much so that senior Washington correspondent, Hallie Jackson, traveled to Savannah to interview me. Ms. Jackson’s story about TikTok and politics was broadcast on NBC Nightly News shortly before the general election, using me as an example of a politician who effectively used TikTok, contrasted with Dr. Oz, who did not.
I narrowly made it out of the Democratic primary on May 24, 2022, against two other candidates, including one who had twice before been the Democratic nominee for the District. I convincingly won the runoff on June 21 with 62% of the vote. The runoff was the most intense period of the campaign. (The two televised debates were the second most intense.)
If Georgia is truly a battleground state, we have lots of work to do. No Democrat won a statewide race on November 8. Democrats showed up for early voting, but they did not show up on election day. Republicans showed up on election day. An incumbent, Senator Warnock won only after a runoff against a very flawed candidate and spending millions and millions of dollars. Georgia’s new lieutenant governor was a fake elector on January 6, 2021.
Congressional districts are drawn to favor the incumbent of whatever party. No congressional incumbent lost in the general election. (No incumbents in statewide races lost in Georgia.)
I carried two counties, including Chatham (Savannah), the most populous county in the District, the county where both the incumbent and I live and have spent our adult careers. I received 58% of the vote in Chatham County and 61% of the vote in Liberty County. In the First District, I received more votes than any other Democrat on the ballot, with the exception of Senator Warnock. I obtained 41% of the District-wide vote. The only other challenger in a Georgia congressional race who exceeded that percentage was Republican Chris West, who received 45% of the vote in Georgia’s 2nd District, a district that Georgia Republicans redrew in 2021 in an effort to make it more competitive for Republicans.
I have an endless supply of new stories, a development that friends and acquaintances will receive with mixed emotions. As a college friend once said, “If Wade likes a story, you’re going to hear it more than once.” (I’ve told that story more than once.) At least these stories are new. Who knows, maybe a book or some public speaking gigs will come out of this.
I am grateful for the experience, and I have no regrets. Thanks again to each one of you.
- Wade Herring

clean_body: [] Best wishes for a prosperous and healthy 2023! Peter, One final report on my congressional campaign. I am so grateful for all of your support of all kinds. Running a political campaign is like starting a business. More than ever, I think small business owners are some of the bravest people I know. I campaigned in all 15 counties of the District, which includes Georgia’s entire coast. I put over 25,000 miles on the campaign vehicle in 10 months’ time. My campaign raised approximately 1.4 million dollars, almost 5 times more than any other Democratic congressional candidate has ever raised in the First District. The only Georgia congressional challenger to raise more was Marcus Flowers. His 15 million dollars could not beat Marjorie Taylor Greene, and he only received 34% of the vote. Seven congressional challengers in Georgia did not top $100,000. I earned the endorsements of the AFL-CIO, Vote Pro Choice, the National Association of Social Workers, Newtown Action Alliance, Friends of the Earth, Moms Demand Action, and Progressive Turnout Project. I had the backing of the AME Church. I campaigned with Senators Warnock and Ossoff, Stacey Abrams, and numerous, local elected officials. The campaign’s TikTok videos went viral (I am the chillest dude in America), so much so that senior Washington correspondent, Hallie Jackson, traveled to Savannah to interview me. Ms. Jackson’s story about TikTok and politics was broadcast on NBC Nightly News shortly before the general election, using me as an example of a politician who effectively used TikTok, contrasted with Dr. Oz, who did not. I narrowly made it out of the Democratic primary on May 24, 2022, against two other candidates, including one who had twice before been the Democratic nominee for the District. I convincingly won the runoff on June 21 with 62% of the vote. The runoff was the most intense period of the campaign. (The two televised debates were the second most intense.) If Georgia is truly a battleground state, we have lots of work to do. No Democrat won a statewide race on November 8. Democrats showed up for early voting, but they did not show up on election day. Republicans showed up on election day. An incumbent, Senator Warnock won only after a runoff against a very flawed candidate and spending millions and millions of dollars. Georgia’s new lieutenant governor was a fake elector on January 6, 2021. Congressional districts are drawn to favor the incumbent of whatever party. No congressional incumbent lost in the general election. (No incumbents in statewide races lost in Georgia.) I carried two counties, including Chatham (Savannah), the most populous county in the District, the county where both the incumbent and I live and have spent our adult careers. I received 58% of the vote in Chatham County and 61% of the vote in Liberty County. In the First District, I received more votes than any other Democrat on the ballot, with the exception of Senator Warnock. I obtained 41% of the District-wide vote. The only other challenger in a Georgia congressional race who exceeded that percentage was Republican Chris West, who received 45% of the vote in Georgia’s 2nd District, a district that Georgia Republicans redrew in 2021 in an effort to make it more competitive for Republicans. I have an endless supply of new stories, a development that friends and acquaintances will receive with mixed emotions. As a college friend once said, “If Wade likes a story, you’re going to hear it more than once.” (I’ve told that story more than once.) At least these stories are new. Who knows, maybe a book or some public speaking gigs will come out of this. I am grateful for the experience, and I have no regrets. Thanks again to each one of you. - Wade Herring [] [] [] www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com Thank you for supporting Wade Herring for Congress. If you prefer to donate via check, please mail your donation to: Wade Herring for Congress PO Box 9145 Savannah, GA 31412 United States Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters. https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655679%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Up%2fK50p95hrCI9dk4eD%2ffw&sysid=1 Update: Buffalo Bill’s Safety Damar Hamlin In Critical Condition

Buffalo Bills safety Damar Hamlin collapsed on the field in a game on Monday night against the Cincinnati Bengals after taking a shot to the chest from an opposing player. Hamlin suffered cardiac arrest and Bills staff say his “heartbeat was restored on the field and he was transferred to the UC Medical Center for further testing and treatment.” He is currently sedated and listed in critical condition,” they added.

body:
We need to mobilize right now, so we can compete against Republican spending in these critical special elections. | | |
---
| | Last year, state Democrats notched key victories in ultra-competitive states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Minnesota that led to flipping chambers across the nation. Now, FIVE special election battles are on the books for this month – and we’re running out of time to ensure our state Democrats have the support they need! Just _look_ at the races happening this month: | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**
---|---|---
1/3 | Georgia | HD-7
1/10 | Virginia | HD-35
1/10 | Virginia | SD-7
1/10 | Mississippi | HD-23
1/31 | Pennsylvania | SD-27
These races are important opportunities for Democrats – **Virginians will be heading back to the polls this November for Election Day, so victories in some of these upcoming special elections could set the tone for 2023 and beyond.**
But that means we need to mobilize _right now,_ so we can compete against Republican spending in these critical special elections.
[With just hours to go before polls close in the first special election of 2023, will you rush a donation of $7, $25 or anything you can spare today to help state Democrats WIN in tough races like these across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PCl6T49avV7IGejk8TWeVS5xpmD7EPVrTZOp1h4uXoAj4j7u0LXuHP_YRuiBU2gpYQWEuiVcHPv68v2SIoot9Qa8NGHQXt38AT769-DoIDP-1Va0K2QijfN2Rlqy9G6Hy6tPZ3Tf2o9NVDsqCYrZyqmK72D3lwG4p6WinEigrtJUrb52uD0DlN0TF6f-j6nM_RypjHU7hi4oknAA_F-v7TMnxw1QZEyRCdHBNWQvnIzaIqrLsD1xwnrjk1emWiL6yIYgD2SEG9k0VhtDnuokB0H9-xWw-K9HYvsWJ4Ach8w-FYp4upT9cqA1Xz4KjftJuag3ttF15q8xVyKbE5_i3c-PgCNkIWT2R-az7L1M3n5n/3sj/4hxDBTVXQXKt1rbX1bxG3A/h0/Dsq-ZXYty-zTx8AQSQlQpzy1JB1acharakbIl55ZEXE)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: as of 7:30pm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
| I want to give you the latest. Republicans have fallen into chaos, crisis, and confusion on the House Floor. Who knows how long it will take for them to get their act together. On the other side of the aisle, House Democrats are united and ready to get to work. [_**And Peter, as of 7:30pm, my team tells me we’re now within striking distance of having our best grassroots fundraising day in history. If just 2 more donors from your city step up, today will go down as a record fundraising day for Democrats. Can I count on you to step up and show the difference in strength between our two parties? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56853850/386188257/1662333042?refcode=20230103_em_fr_b2_jeffries_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjE3OGU0My1jOThiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WtuFJjysAsRqQg-NR0U1p0pEq6qjTj_8hk9RQguoWiA=) [**PeterI’m so humbled by the outpouring of support you’ve shown me today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56853851/386188258/1662333042?refcode=20230103_em_fr_b2_jeffries_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjE3OGU0My1jOThiLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WtuFJjysAsRqQg-NR0U1p0pEq6qjTj_8hk9RQguoWiA=) Now, we have a chance to make a powerful statement. | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDAzLTBkYmM0Yzg3YjY2YzRmNjZiOTk4MjVhOTAwNjBiZDI4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B0di5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL2ZpbmFsLWNvbnF1ZXN0LXJldmVsYXRpb24tc2VyaWVzLW9mZmVycy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1maW5hbF9jb25xdWVzdCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk8zMzk3NSJ9/-WPCE1OGcpE2ainZPWRMRQ)

Hello Friend,Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?_When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!__When we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to be glorious!**But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God's Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I've found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days.And today, I'm pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It's all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history.This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn't want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God's plan as never before - you'll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free!You can make your most generous donation here: [https://ptv.org/donate/final-conquest-generous-gift/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Friend, last month marked 10 years since the tragic mass shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. In the decade since, the senseless bloodshed has continued.

**The vast majority of Americans support a ban on the assault-style weapons that are frequently used in mass shootings, but the GOP continues to stand in the way of any meaningful gun reform.**

**President Biden, however, has taken a stand and called for assault weapons to be banned. **

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I hope you have been able to spend time with your loved ones for the holidays as well to recharge for the year ahead.
#
Happy New Year, friends! We had quite a year!! After taking the last few weeks to rest, to call friends and supporters like you (with still more calls to go!) and to spend time with family, I’ve heard from many of you asking what I’ve been up to or what’s next — so I thought I’d drop you a note.
Over the holidays, I’ve spent valuable time with family and friends. My family and I have enjoyed holiday gatherings and remembered those less fortunate. Curt and I spent Christmas with our sons and extended family. I hope you have been able to spend time with your loved ones for the holidays as well to recharge for the year ahead.
On Saturday night, I watched the acorn drop in Raleigh with Curt as we toasted to a new year filled with joy, love and purpose. We also reflected on the year that was 2022, and while we had hoped for a different election result, I will always cherish our collective commitment to our state and nation. I truly appreciate the outpouring of support from people like you from all over.
I am deeply grateful for everything you did, and I know that our state is better for it. Because of what we accomplished together, I am even more committed to fighting for our families and small businesses. As I said on Election Day, I am disappointed but not defeated. I am committed to the fight for the people of North Carolina, democracy and justice.
Truthfully, I don’t know what is next for me. I’ve had the honor and privilege of serving our great state for over 20 years. I appreciate all of the encouragement and ideas, but for now, I am taking this moment to appreciate the journey.
Progress in this country has never been easy. It takes time. And always in the face of injustice and adversity, we have continued to fight. The new year is a great opportunity to renew our commitment to serving our state and honoring each other’s humanity.
North Carolina and her people are worth fighting for, and I look forward to continuing that work together.
Thank you again for everything, and have a very Happy New Year!
With gratitude,
Cheri Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2279%2E357359%2EtII0if). name: Bobby Jindal
subject: FOX NEWS: Four paradoxes of health care reform: Conservatives can take moral and political high ground
body:
What Americans want from health care coverage is peace of mind| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1082872fb5304177b297121fbfddc4bc&_e=_qJqk0P7knWUTf6E3gu9SrApaLBdZo4lQAQDz87p5YbmlhRqa-6CesUmcfWosBVDI02B0Ici6_70jPxvr1jn2z_EbUKVQlGel7y07J_58v9HD7QSveHXucgQ-sL9-DOTeMM92RN1DiJpKomaFQOT1-KCkveOP6fbipE2lCfwBwMOuEaUawTO7AaJSsw1rk-8cfyk_MpYVUrTseaNvn9z0A%3D%3D)
---
_**FOX NEWS: Four paradoxes of health care reform: Conservatives can take moral and political high ground**_ By Bobby Jindal and Newt Gingrich
---
Polls show that Americans trust Democrats over Republicans on health caremore than any other issue. However, they also show that conservative health care solutions, such as price transparency and increasing choice and competition to lower prices, are popular. This dynamic has led to a conventional wisdom among the center-right health care reform community – that Americans will come around to trusting conservatives if we talk more about our market and state and local-based policies to make care and coverage more affordable. We agree that conservatives should not shy away from discussing health care, but opinion research our two organizations conducted this summer suggests that a message too focused on market fundamentalism and saving money will backfire. [_**FINISH READING ON FOXNEWS.COM**_](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1082872fb5304177b297121fbfddc4bc&_e=_qJqk0P7knWUTf6E3gu9Ssusc7VTSUuurAF3wDGUcveC3Y4iVf7Zhn6MVEtOX77zNrjxWO1lk-KGEpgigtn7gY32T_-r3S0NncmYiuByaUCK0B0KwUJav1QWUw-_lKoAHTrYuD07egczZoXM5gohSIUc1NFGcKN3pNrm5tvyy35_KSS38YCyW05Ttc-XN4UyppcgIqRxRHPWwymrXco3wTIMsoTxKOtgJieevIfsxmxCpvAd44jfsGuPw8G_pFM0XxSovC1MCtSDXhgyO5i2ObCCGlX6--67a5A8-mpQ63ssnjhx5NjKPG4sF7EtuXvr)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: when I look to the future
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=e8e1f72a0e7e48f682e6d7ed37583fd6&_e=A_tUMTo78rCox2JkobgHwm2ALQBRyOam7050k1Gn6y9Ogc6JTuY3z-CozGHt8HPWV9UIYF57zHOBQaBoCl4oLFD4_sXVSrHoLpWDUnJr4_d7HOYFQCgWbs2TpNHxSMkAYLNzFQX78fGM5qPhpLO-nh28flrR3bJFPn9r8uvTQRLfjvgO4Y-RxOxdzql40LW3pCPxomYgRasakKjjRiq5IfeQQWnV6KBEpPtVMaHng3GXo23oOzuvFSEhQSgqDInSzfdHSPNHvCK_7mV7V636S2nilZ0BDjDVcQsmoSCGYO5BMIM1ErdTX9k1ci94PbZsnLykbBx-7yGquSh6XG8bVCRae_j0KdM232CwagBZMdw0tyL6EOJJPVl8pi92Plmf)
---
Friend,
---
When I look to the future, I marvel at what I see. A country — proud of its principles and its place in the world. A free people — at peace with each other and protecting our values. A culture — the greatest the world has ever known, yet always growing greater still. There are those who see America’s glory days as behind us, but I don’t believe it. How could I, after the life I’ve lived? I’m the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. We were the only ones in our small, rural town of Bamberg, population 2,500. My dad wore a turban. He still does to this day. My mom wore a sari. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. I was a brown girl in a black-and-white world. **_And yet, as a child,_** I saw the promise of America unfold before me. **_As governor,_** I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and show our nation a better way. **_And as Ambassador,_** I saw that America is still the standard. Where we lead, the world follows. When we speak, the world listens. What we are, the world wants. My friends, America is worth fighting for. America is worth living for. We are being called to prove ourselves worthy of the gift we’ve been given — the gift of being citizens of these United States. I have answered that call. And I always will. Because as my parents always reminded me, my brothers, and my sister... even on our worst day, we are blessed to live in America. I launched Stand For America PAC two years ago to continue my mission to stand for America and support bold conservative candidates across the country. I’ve been working nonstop to champion conservative values, rally alongside freedom-loving conservatives, and stand for America. **[If you want to join me in the fight, please consider chipping in a donation to Stand For America PAC today.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=e8e1f72a0e7e48f682e6d7ed37583fd6&_e=A_tUMTo78rCox2JkobgHwm2ALQBRyOam7050k1Gn6y9Ogc6JTuY3z-CozGHt8HPWV9UIYF57zHOBQaBoCl4oLFD4_sXVSrHoLpWDUnJr4_d7HOYFQCgWbs2TpNHxSMkAYLNzFQX78fGM5qPhpLO-nh28flrR3bJFPn9r8uvTQRLfjvgO4Y-RxOxdzql40LW3pCPxomYgRasakKjjRiq5Id7Ba976llTYUrej22D4_GCTHcuPhTgweOOuSwfd8M4hUJnXK_8D33-HFHWdORW4v6_qTbeV6GiuiRcLhMXOMXRNnzfVrYP-tOlt5j06GRBYoU9NtCvgLsIH_G0XRzKVxn1l5vxXaOQaqvlq9ha9uOjgYR42HT0kgdONMpzA-Ho6) ** My very best,
---

**This changes everything for Democrats. We now have a huge opportunity to step in and show what we can do – _but only if we move quickly to prove our numbers._**

body:
| I can hardly believe my eyes – I just watched House Republicans plunge into utter chaos on the House floor.

Minutes ago, extreme MAGA Republicans failed to vote for a Speaker of the House for the first time in decades.

Let me repeat that: Kevin McCarthy’s own Republicans just rejected him – proving House Republicans are fighting themselves instead of fighting for the people.

**This changes everything for Democrats._We now have a huge opportunity to step in and show what we can do – but only if we move quickly to prove our numbers._**

[**So I need my own massive show of support right now to prove that, while Republicans are in complete disarray, Democrats stand united and ready to take the reins. If I can gather 1,000 gifts before midnight, we’ll have a historic fundraising day and show that Democrats are ready to take back the House. I’m counting on your $7 in this defining moment more than you can imagine »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37897?t=6&akid=5954%2E878179%2EqVdqwf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hakeem Jeffries and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37898?t=7&akid=5954%2E878179%2EqVdqwf)

Keep the faith,

Hakeem

name: Giffords
subject: Our new Congress is being sworn in today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
There’s no doubt about it: We’ll face challenges with our new Congress
#

Friends, today is the swearing-in of the 118th Congress. This is a day of excitement for many, a feeling that Gabby knows firsthand. On the day of Gabby’s first swearing-in, she was filled with hope. She knew she was stepping into an important role where she had the ability to help enact meaningful legislation to improve the lives of millions across our nation.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=1&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)_Photo of Gabby being sworn in to her first term in Congress in 2007_
Although today is an exciting day, there’s still no doubt about it: our new Congress will present us with new challenges in the fight to end gun violence.
We’re up against a Republican majority in the House of Representatives and a narrowly divided Senate, in addition to a radical Supreme Court majority.
Some of the extreme Republican members of the House will try to advance dangerous gun lobby priorities, such as deregulating silencers and concealed carry reciprocity, instead of putting the safety of our communities first.
With a narrowly divided Senate, we will have to fight for every last vote to ensure we can pass more transformative legislation like last year’s Bipartisan Safer Communities Act.
We have had great successes in the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence in the decade since Giffords’ founding. But the challenges this new Congress presents are real.
And we can’t take these challenges on and stand up to the gun lobby without you.
[**So will you please help us start off this new year strong by making a contribution of $3 or any amount you can afford?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=2&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-jan23.C46tVD&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=21&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan23.7iD0Mu&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=22&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan23.5RCsE0&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=23&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan23.CbkSJK&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=24&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan23.bUZFep&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=25&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan23.4kE3Tp&refcode=em230103-1-15&t=26&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup)**
---
****
Gun safety has widespread support, and we’ll never back down from the fight for safer communities. We look forward to working with our new Congress and making sure that they hear our voices loud and clear.
Thank you,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=3931%2E3935704%2EiCOxup) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Two new JDs are being sworn in today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Today is the day. Today is the day when the newest Justice Democrats Greg
Casar and Summer Lee will officially be sworn into office and join our
bloc in Congress. Now they’ll fight alongside progressive champions like
AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Rashida Tlaib.

Our endorsed candidates have already made waves when they ran bold,
unapologetically progressive campaigns and won. Now they’ll officially
enter Congress ready to fight for our movement every single day.

You make all of our work possible — including recruiting and helping to
elect our candidates like Summer Lee. These historic victories are yours
to celebrate and be proud of, too.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124115?refcode=em20230103-26885&t=1001&akid=26885%2E1203867%2EKyUYSL ]In celebration of our Justice Democrats being sworn into office, will
you rush a $3 donation to support our ongoing work to elect
progressive champions who will bring our movement to Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124115?refcode=em20230103-26885&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26885%2E1203867%2EKyUYSL ]Contribute $3

Greg Casar and Summer Lee both made history when they won their elections.
And we were right there with them.

Summer Lee will be the first Black woman to ever represent Pennsylvania in
Congress. She overcame an avalanche of spending from far-right groups like
AIPAC with a decisive victory. Greg Casar has been called the most
progressive candidate ever elected from Texas.

This work is tough. Our candidates face dark money spending from AIPAC,
smear campaigns, and the uphill battle of running as working people when
the odds are stacked against them. But today, it’s all worth it.

We’re in this fight for a reason — because the work we do matters. And our
grassroots supporters like you are the reason we can keep going.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124115?refcode=em20230103-26885&t=1021&akid=26885%2E1203867%2EKyUYSL ]Peter, can
you donate $3 or any amount to fund our work today — so we
can elect more Justice Democrats like Summer and Greg?

Thank you for your support in this fight,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26885%2E1203867%2EKyUYSL ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26885%2E1203867%2EKyUYSL ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230103-26885-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26885_1203867_KyUYSL&akid=26885%2E1203867%2EKyUYSL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26885%2E1203867%2EKyUYSL

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Our Revolution
subject: Lobbyists declare war on Bernie as new HELP Chairman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8186?t=1011&akid=3856%2E5885482%2EQAy9WS ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Big Pharma and Health Insurance lobbyists
are panicking because they know they can’t use their usual tricks to buy
off Bernie Sanders.

As the new Chairman of the HELP Committee, Bernie will have the power to
hold hearings to push for Medicare for All, expose price gouging that has
Americans choosing between lifesaving drugs and homelessness, and more of
the shocking greed that defines the American healthcare system.

That’s why Politico is reporting that industry lobbyists – who outnumber
elected officials by 3 to 1 in Washington – are already scheming about
attacking Bernie and persuading corporate Democrats to block his work.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8186?t=1012&akid=3856%2E5885482%2EQAy9WS ]Healthcare lobbyists are used to getting their way, but they’ve never
been up against a chair like Bernie Sanders. Can we count on you to join
Our Revolution as a monthly donor to help us counter their cash and dirty
tactics?

Click here to make a recurring contribution to Our Revolution!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8186?t=1013&akid=3856%2E5885482%2EQAy9WS ]DONATE

The Healthcare industry can only win by using its unlimited money to
confuse the debate and distract the American people from what’s happening.
That’s why your support is so critical.

We can’t let their cash drown out Bernie’s message that all Americans
deserve affordable health care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8186?t=1014&akid=3856%2E5885482%2EQAy9WS ]Please join Our Revolution as a recurring donor to help us fight back
against healthcare and big pharma lobbyists coming after Bernie!

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m on the ballot this cycle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Thank you. Because of this community’s generosity, we finished out the year in a good place. Every dollar makes a difference -- especially as we enter a new election cycle. And this time, I’m on the ballot.
As we begin the New Year, I’m thinking of the progress we’ve made as a country and the work that still needs to be done. We need to strengthen wages and job opportunities, get dark money out of our elections, combat voter suppression, and restore access to reproductive care across the country. Those are all things I’m working on in the Senate.
Now that I’ll be on the ballot again this cycle, I’m counting on you to continue being part of our movement in the months to come, because victories don’t happen overnight. They are the product of months of hard work, organizing, and of course, fundraising. We’re already laying the groundwork -- building our staff and planning our budget and strategy.
It’s going to take time and it’s going to take a lot of hard work, but I know if we stick with it, we can do this.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230103?refcode=sbe230103_nd]

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Hi there,

Thank you for your continued support. Now that we've locked down the North Carolina Senate seat, I want to lay out my plan for America. [**_Will you join me in fighting for your freedom?_**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=a0206f5ad2634ed9a5e92ccb8ebfa30b&_e=m8MkDWZoIXQrmpDLb_-yohIKmhR3UMWFUAK_VlyMqzIbbcmAox1RforJoP0Jm0StOeyTbPyavbG0nNPaSVFJTzyFelVMAtFkIK08J71eZj2tqHCvz6tqLU7wb_EobnDpJqXwU2VkungUGd3NLplHWk_FnImEGysyr8klfFxi6m3QXOotWn9U_cuZFTcheUJYnMCCEzRIbGIZvJomphS8fM7ppkbdHn9A3w77FRGeC-q7AWpr8d9DH9vEnKDvcy-vJpQ9rEzPLXlSYJJl1w6Wy3pcKWeNv3invRavWtXwoPYoy1Vv7-LpG143oopzOwhl2dTT45S91Xq0z85YForaq1pBWbzeT6rkilaVyAgpy0tJeHfdBLOepql-UHxXxsfw5DfRGPTDQ4rPVjz1TGYJr_munp7rTY0wQq2FMxs8Ddn04kyWwL48laESjuFbEFEMlUZTFkh2Vk4JqCAyY7cmeFoGQwKuHzMLjlC6zpQY8khkljsE2-xRZBz-xmJg_qBzYU8Lv3a1oeO1h3RTnb4ygw%3D%3D)

I intend to fight for you each day in the Senate by promoting and protecting the Conservative values that have shaped our great country. **_Here 's my plan:_**

✅ I will protect your values and freedom by limiting the scope of government and cutting bureaucratic red tape.

✅ I will be tough on crime and ensure that criminals are off the streets.

✅ I will always protect your right to defend yourself and will NEVER encroach on the Second Amendment.

✅ I will hold our government officials accountable for their actions limiting your freedom and wasting your money.

**Please join me in promoting freedom and defending our country.** The Senate majority remains under Democrat control, so I need your help now more than ever. Together, we can turn America around and put an end to senseless liberal policies. [**_Are you on board?_**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=a0206f5ad2634ed9a5e92ccb8ebfa30b&_e=m8MkDWZoIXQrmpDLb_-yohIKmhR3UMWFUAK_VlyMqzIbbcmAox1RforJoP0Jm0StOeyTbPyavbG0nNPaSVFJTzyFelVMAtFkIK08J71eZj2tqHCvz6tqLU7wb_EobnDpJqXwU2VkungUGd3NLplHWk_FnImEGysyr8klfFxi6m3QXOotWn9U_cuZFTcheUJYnMCCEzRIbGIZvJomphS8fM7ppkbdHn9A3w77FRGeC-q7AWpr8d9DH9vEnKDvcy-vJpQ9rEzPLXlSYJJl1w6Wy3pcKWeNv3invRavWtXwoPYoy1Vv7-LpG143oopzOwhl2dTT45S91Xq0z85YForaq1pBWbzeT6rkilaVyAgpy0tJeHfdBLOepql-UHxXxsfwJLh5xUXJqOTE_PLJYmQep9UJocouCANOqkfQTb4W-GueVXrokTtmJDddP0ndQrKPCnPv9-kpPj9PuQJwWTeN67hkFRJZqG0ZQuMQT9_9d9avtRBPF1uUI1-NOJTXG1nT8DbyxED61VKi-jmvMLfMQQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I'd love your support | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hi there, Thank you for your continued support. Now that we've locked down the North Carolina Senate seat, I want to lay out my plan for America. | I intend to fight for you each day in the Senate by promoting and protecting the Conservative values that have shaped our great country. Here 's my plan: ✅ I will protect your values and freedom by limiting the scope of government and cutting bureaucratic red tape. ✅ I will be tough on crime and ensure that criminals are off the streets. ✅ I will always protect your right to defend yourself and will NEVER encroach on the Second Amendment. ✅ I will hold our government officials accountable for their actions limiting your freedom and wasting your money. Please join me in promoting freedom and defending our country. The Senate majority remains under Democrat control, so I need your help now more than ever. Together, we can turn America around and put an end to senseless liberal policies. I am so grateful for the opportunity to serve you in the U.S. Senate. Many thanks, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

I must say, Peter, I'm stunned by what's unfolding today. I'm in Washington this week to officially be sworn into Congress. Instead, I've been watching the stalled House vote to elect a new Speaker of the House. If you haven't heard the news, the Republican Majority plunged into utter chaos on the House floor today and failed to elect a Speaker for the first time in a century. Democrats unified behind Hakeem Jeffries -- who tallied the most votes of any nominee. But a total of 19 Republicans voted against Rep. Kevin McCarthy. That's a massive number, Peter, and there's little indication McCarthy will win a majority after the third attempt -- which is now underway. **The GOP is in complete disarray headed into 2023, and it's a concerning sign for what Republican control of the House will look like: More chaos, discord, and gridlock.** The good news is that Democrats are unified and clear-eyed about the future of our country. Not only that, we’re now in a strong position to retake the House in 2024. But if we're going to do this, we need to send a resounding message -- _especially today_ \-- that our supporters are still here and ready to take on this challenge. **[We need a wave of grassroots support right now to prove Democrats have what it takes to correct course in Washington. I’m hoping you'll show up with a $5 donation to help support my reflection effort, retake the House, and put an end to the MAGA extremism that we're up against.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAhEqs6AkSYBRHgC_6K6_YCf_vLmLSShI0C-enz4jdYEs-HAMP1DUhJmreHrdF8OpuPgGu3K7hHv7oteiWR_3L-4bg3C7BU_9BaueeeNbJS7xZ0kzElBLqzxMOhakf_W2HBXsB3OgMH3pdYUlECTC9PQB7MzTj5al_yCJfEyyNt8L9Zb7zXnHaDYxMQ0W3c26egipUp9ReEALIh9cKdFw_7-ELHLFg6JDffhMG-0Qcgn-4PwegK6e60CJQvuceHpX7c0OW4ybhnbEOyhx31mP9PQ/3sj/IxFaK-E9Qgaaw9upYXfmIA/h1/PrhtpIdqmdPLYXr5elpZTKLrJoN7NXjqk_0PbUK4nXI)**
